# Personal Wiki Corpus — exported 2026-07-11

This is the complete text corpus of a personal wiki: biographical history,
psychological/ideological profile, relationships, and life records of one person.
Each section below is one page, headed by its path.

# Art and Movies Favorites

Minor categories in the masterlist (Art 25, Movies 11). All Art entries rated 5; movies unrated with minimal metadata.

## Art
25 items from ART MATRIX source. One per creator (high eclecticism). All rated 5.

Contributes to overall artistic interests profile (81st percentile per spine [[wiki/self/context-core]]). Descriptive tags often align with architect/INTP themes: architecture, fortress, recursive, liminal, dread, mask, geometry, utopia, psyche.

### Sample Art Entries (title | creator | tags)

| Title | Creator | Tags |
|-------|---------|------|
| The Drawbridge (Carceri d'Invenzione, Plate VII) | Giovanni Battista Piranesi | art,painting,architecture,fortress,recursive,psyche,INTP |
| The Oath of the Horatii | Jacques-Louis David | art,painting,roman,republic,code,fortress |
| Cenotaph for Newton | Étienne-Louis Boullée | art,architecture,geometric,fortress,utopia |
| The Duel After the Masquerade | Jean-Léon Gérôme | art,painting,performance,mask,wound,hinge |
| The Melancholy and Mystery of a Street | Giorgio de Chirico | art,painting,liminal,dread,observer |
| (others: Ilya Repin, Francis Bacon, Théodore Géricault, Francisco Goya, Zdzisław Beksiński, etc. — 25 total unique) |

Full list defers to raw. Visual/fortress/recursive motifs tie to [[wiki/mind/concepts/abyssal-architect]] and production aesthetics.

## Movies
11 items. Sparse data (no creators, no tags, no dates in extract). Complements broader cultural consumption (dark, psychological, satirical, crime, sci-fi lean).

### Full Movies List

| Title | Notes |
|-------|-------|
| Parasite | - |
| The Prestige | - |
| Pulp Fiction | - |
| The Witch | - |
| The Shining | - |
| The King of Comedy | - |
| Taxi Driver | - |
| There Will Be Blood | - |
| The Graduate | - |
| Eyes Wide Shut | - |
| Kill Bill | - |

Ties to film as extension of forensic/observational lens (see [[wiki/self/context-core]]).

## Sources
raw/self/favorites/FAVS MASTERLIST.csv (ART MATRIX + MOVIES FAVS.rtf origins)

Cross: [[wiki/self/facebook]] (visual arts + photography in ads interests), [[wiki/interests/favorites/eclecticism]], [[wiki/interests/favorites/taste-profile]], [[wiki/mind/synthesis/totality-themes]], [[wiki/interests/music/index]] (shared artistic thread).

# Book Favorites

**120 books**, overwhelmingly non-fiction with heavy emphasis on politics, history, recent events, and power structures.

This reading list is a direct window into political and intellectual dimensions of the self model.

## Dimensions

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Total | 120 |
| Unique authors | 98 |
| My Rating 5 | 29 |
| My Rating 4 | 42 |
| My Rating 3 | 32 |
| My Rating 2 | 7 |
| My Rating 1 | 1 |
| My Rating 0 | 9 |
| High-rated (4+) | 71 |

All 120 books carry ratings (unlike music). 5-star examples include Hardcore History (Carlin), Nuclear War (Jacobsen), American Prometheus (Bird), Rubicon (Holland), Caesar (Goldsworthy), The Rise and Fall of the Third Reich (Shirer).

## Date Patterns

| Metric | Years (count) |
|--------|---------------|
| Date Read | 2024 (53), 2023 (16), 2025 (5), 2022 (4), 2019 (1) |
| Date Added | 2024 (59), 2022 (46), 2023 (11), 2025 (4) |

Heavy 2024 consumption; some books added 2022 read later. Aligns forensic/political reading intensity in recent periods.

## Top Authors

| Author | Count |
|--------|-------|
| Woodward, Bob | 5 |
| Wolff, Michael | 5 |
| Goldsworthy, Adrian | 4 |
| Karl, Jonathan | 3 |
| Carlin, Dan | 2 |
| Webb, Whitney Alyse | 2 |
| Plutarch | 2 |
| Shirer, William L. | 2 |
| Swanson, James L. | 2 |
| Sanders, Bernie | 2 |
| Greene, Robert | 2 |
| Strauss, Barry S. | 2 |
| Marx, Karl | 2 |

See author pages in [[wiki/interests/favorites/books/authors/]].

**5-star authors (multiple):** Wolff, Michael (3), Karl, Jonathan (2), Plutarch (2).

## Detailed Books Snapshot (from FAVORITES DATA (2).md)

Targeted extract of high-signal books with ratings, read dates, and shelves (subset/parallel to master CSV; overlaps confirmed for Goldsworthy, Holland, Shirer, Swanson, Bird, Plutarch).

| Title | Author | My Rating | Date Read | Key Shelves |
|-------|--------|-----------|-----------|-------------|
| Caesar: Life of a Colossus | Goldsworthy, Adrian | ★★★★★ | Jul 31, 2024 | ancient-history, biography, caesar, great-man-theory, history, non-fiction, philosophy, roman-republic, top-shelf |
| Cicero: The Life and Times of Rome's Greatest Politician | Everitt, Anthony | ★★★★☆ | Dec 21, 2024 | ancient-history, biography, history, non-fiction, politics, roman-republic, top-shelf |
| Rubicon: The Last Years of the Roman Republic | Holland, Tom | ★★★★★ | Apr 07, 2024 | ancient-history, caesar, history, non-fiction, politics, roman-republic, top-shelf, war |
| Manhunt: The 12-Day Chase for Lincoln's Killer | Swanson, James L. | ★★★★☆ | Jan 2024 | american-history, crime, history, non-fiction, top-shelf |
| The Assassination of Julius Caesar: A People's History of Ancient Rome | Parenti, Michael | ★★★★☆ | Apr 29, 2024 | ancient-history, caesar, crime, history, non-fiction, roman-republic |
| The Rise and Fall of the Third Reich: A History of Nazi Germany | Shirer, William L. | ★★★★★ | Jan 26, 2023 | gonzo, history, journalism, massive, non-fiction, politics, source, top-shelf, war |
| Personality Types: Using the Enneagram for Self-Discovery | Riso, Don Richard | ★★★★☆ | (not set) | massive, non-fiction, personality, philosophy, science, self-improvement, sociology, top-shelf |
| American Prometheus: The Triumph and Tragedy of J. Robert Oppenheimer | Bird, Kai | ★★★★★ | Jul 14, 2023 | american-history, biography, great-man-theory, history, massive, non-fiction, science, source, top-shelf, war |
| Family of Secrets: The Bush Dynasty... | Baker, Russ | ★★☆☆☆ | Jan 06, 2023 | american-history, conservative, conspiracy, history, journalism, non-fiction, politics, president, top-shelf |
| Lives of the Noble Romans | Plutarch | ★★★☆☆ | Jan 2024 | ancient-history, history, non-fiction, politics, roman-republic, stories, war |
| Game Change: Obama and the Clintons... | Heilemann, John | ★★★★☆ |  | politics, recent-history |

New or expanded topical signals: Parenti (people's history/caesar), Riso (Enneagram/personality tying to [[wiki/mind/concepts/abyssal-architect]] / FULL PROFILE typology), Baker (conspiracy/Bush dynasty), Everitt (Cicero). Crosses to ancient-history, war, conspiracy topics. Dates cluster 2023-2024 reads.

This snapshot enriches the 120-book corpus with specific consumption timestamps aligning to 2024 political/history intensity (see periods [[wiki/timeline/periods/2025-collapse]], [[wiki/timeline/periods/2021-2023-employment-block]] forensic reading).

See topic pages in [[wiki/interests/favorites/books/topics/]].

## Patterns

Strong focus on American political history, journalism, power analysis, and recent events (Trump era, elections, institutions). Ancient/Roman history and war provide broader context. "jan-6", "conspiracy", "leftist", "conservative" tags show engaged skepticism.

Aligns with democratic socialist politics, institutional skepticism, and forensic approach to narratives in [[wiki/self/context-core]].

High volume of "top-shelf" and non-fiction indicates deliberate, serious reading.

## Relation to Self

Reading as extension of political engagement and truth-seeking. Complements Twitter activity and other media consumption. Ties to [[wiki/self/facebook]] political likes (AOC, Trump White House, Dawkins, philosophy, science skepticism) and ads interests.

See [[wiki/self/context-core]] §7 Political + Intellectual and [[wiki/self/overview]].

Cross: [[wiki/interests/favorites/eclecticism]], [[wiki/interests/favorites/taste-profile]], [[wiki/mind/synthesis/totality-themes]] (Political Intensity theme).

# Eclecticism in Favorites

## Music
1,477 unique artists in 1,860 tracks — deliberately broad (avg 1.26 tracks/artist). Three main clusters (exp. hip-hop, emo/rock, electronic/bass) each ~5% indicative with dominant long tail. Top: JPEGMAFIA (13), Kanye West (11), MCR (9) etc. Release years heavy on 2025-2026 new material.

## Books
98 authors across 120 titles, spanning ancient (Plutarch, Goldsworthy Roman) to immediate present (Trump-era journalism, 2024 reads). 29 rated 5.

## Art/Movies
Art: 25 unique (Piranesi, David, Boullée, Goya, Beksiński etc.) — architecture/fortress/recursive/liminal tags. Movies: 11 (Parasite to Kill Bill).

## Ties to Broader
Continuity with [[wiki/self/facebook]] likes and 2007-2014 signals. Aligns production (sub-bass/electronic) per [[wiki/interests/music/concepts/sub-bass-signature]] and Jimmy Pop cultural framing.

## Interpretation
Reflects high openness and pattern-seeking across domains, consistent with the architect frame and cognitive profile [[wiki/self/context-core]]. See also [[wiki/interests/favorites/taste-profile]], [[wiki/mind/synthesis/totality-themes]].

# Favorites

_Last updated: 2026-06-23_ (FB archive music likes + EDM events cross-ref; ancestry music influence via Fran)

This is the dedicated category for personal favorites data from the master list (music, books, art, movies).

**Total entries:** 2,016 (raw count from FAVS MASTERLIST.csv)

| Category | Count | %     | Notes |
|----------|-------|-------|-------|
| Music    | 1,860 | 92.3% | 1,477 unique artists (~1.26 avg); inclusion only (0 rated) |
| Book     | 120   | 6.0%  | 98 unique authors; all rated (29 @5, 42 @4) |
| Art      | 25    | 1.2%  | 25 unique creators (all rated 5); painters/architects |
| Movie    | 11    | 0.5%  | 11 titles (unrated); sparse metadata |
| **Total**| **2,016** | 100% | — |

## Key Patterns from Deep Parse
- **Music releases**: 2025 (530), 2026 (197), 2024 (145) dominant — aligns recent listening with [[wiki/timeline/periods/2025-collapse]] music reactivation.
- **Books read**: Primarily 2024 (53), 2023 (16) — heavy non-fiction politics/history focus.
- **Clusters (music)**: ~balanced experimental hip-hop, emo/punk/rock, electronic/bass (~90-96 tracks each indicative); high long-tail eclecticism.
- **FB continuity**: Overlaps with [[wiki/self/facebook]] music likes (Elliott Smith 7, Fall Out Boy 6, Say Anything 6, Lil Wayne 5); 2007 status updates prefigure current top artists.
- No "sub-bass" or "Jimmy Pop" strings in CSV itself; those are contextual from chats + production spine.

The list reflects an eclectic, high-intensity taste profile consistent with the behavioral spine in [[wiki/self/context-core]]: high Artistic Interests (81st), political focus, and music as a core sincere channel. See [[wiki/interests/favorites/eclecticism]], [[wiki/interests/favorites/taste-profile]].

## Sections
- [[wiki/interests/favorites/music]] — Music favorites breakdown (expanded top artists, clusters, FB ties, release dates)
- [[wiki/interests/favorites/books]] — Book favorites and reading patterns
- [[wiki/interests/favorites/art-and-movies]] — Art and film

## Analysis Pages
See subpages for clusters, top artists, authors, and topics. Cross [[wiki/mind/synthesis/totality-themes]] for corpus integration.

This data feeds self-model insights (eclecticism, political engagement, production taste) and should be cross-referenced with the authoritative [[wiki/self/context-core]]. Sources defer to raw/self/favorites/FAVS MASTERLIST.csv (immutable).

# Electronic & Bass Music Cluster

**Artists in top tier:** LYNY (7), Knock2 (6), Effin (6), Mau P (6), PEEKABOO (5), Levity (5), Nikita the Wicked (5), rSUN (7), oskar med k (5)

## Reflection
Strong modern electronic and bass presence. Directly relevant to current production (Gripnotic) and historical sub-bass signature (63-85% across aliases).

This cluster represents a core, sincere area of taste.

# Music Favorites

**1,860 tracks** from the FAVS MASTERLIST, spanning 1,477 unique artists (avg ~1.26 tracks per artist — high eclecticism/diversity).

Music entries carry no My Rating (inclusion signal only, primarily from Spotify likes); contrast with rated books/art.

## Corpus Dimensions

| Metric                  | Value          |
|-------------------------|----------------|
| Total tracks            | 1,860         |
| Unique artists          | 1,477         |
| Avg tracks per artist   | ~1.26         |
| Primary origins         | SPOTIFY LIKED 2025-2026 (1,384), MUSIC LIST (start-2024) (463) |
| Music with My Rating    | 0 (inclusion-based) |

## Release Date Distribution (heavy recent)

| Year | Count |
|------|-------|
| 2025 | 530   |
| 2026 | 197   |
| 2024 | 145   |
| 2023 | 88    |
| 2022 | 51    |
| 2021 | 45    |
| 2020 | 40    |
| 2019 | 38    |
| 2017 | 51    |

Recent dominance (2025-2026 >700 tracks) aligns with music reactivation in [[wiki/timeline/periods/2025-collapse]] / [[wiki/timeline/periods/dec-2025-spike]] and post-2025 PA return.

High diversity (low tracks per artist on average). Clusters in experimental hip-hop, emo/rock, and modern electronic/bass music.

This strongly aligns with production identity and the involuntary sub-bass signature documented in the spine. See [[wiki/interests/music/concepts/sub-bass-signature]].

**Cultural context (from Jimmy Pop discussion):** Explicit argument, backed by streaming (rock 234B vs hip-hop/R&B 341B), market share (rock 11%), charts, and instrument sales data, that guitar-driven rock is culturally irrelevant in the current era — the first such period since ~1963. Guitar music framed as "automatically lame" in mainstream; catalog acts dominate what remains. Preference for electronic/bass, hip-hop, and emo clusters is defended as alignment with actual cultural shift rather than nostalgia. Ties directly to FAVS clusters. See [[wiki/self/notes/jimmy-pop-pennsylvania]].

## Top Artists (by count) — Expanded

| Artist                | Count |
|-----------------------|-------|
| JPEGMAFIA             | 13    |
| Kanye West            | 11    |
| My Chemical Romance   | 9     |
| New Found Glory       | 8     |

See individual artist pages in [[wiki/interests/favorites/music/artists/]] (e.g. [[wiki/interests/favorites/music/artists/jpegmafia]], [[wiki/interests/favorites/music/artists/kanye-west]], [[wiki/interests/favorites/music/artists/elliott-smith]]) for details. Long tail of 1-3 track artists dominates (high eclecticism).

## Taste Clusters

Refined from tags/creators (approximate non-exclusive counts from keyword+name scan):

- **Experimental / Abrasive Hip-Hop** (~92 tracks): JPEGMAFIA (13), Kanye West (11), A$AP Rocky (5), Lil Wayne (5), Tyler The Creator (4), Atmosphere, Lupe Fiasco, BROCKHAMPTON, Jedi Mind Tricks. Dense, innovative, often political production.
- **Emo, Pop-Punk, Indie Rock** (~93 tracks): My Chemical Romance (9), New Found Glory (8), Fall Out Boy (6), Taking Back Sunday (6), Say Anything (6), Elliott Smith (7), Bloc Party (5), Death Cab for Cutie (4), Manchester Orchestra, The Mars Volta, Four Year Strong, Pixies, Placebo, Radiohead (3).
- **Electronic, Bass, Modern Dance** (~96 tracks): LYNY (7), Knock2 (6), Effin (6), Mau P (6), PEEKABOO (5), Levity (5), Nikita the Wicked (5), rSUN (7), oskar med k (5), borne (5), A.M.C (5), STVSH, ERBES, AHEE, Odd Mob etc. Direct alignment to current production and sub-bass.

See dedicated [[wiki/interests/favorites/music/electronic-bass]].

The electronic/bass presence directly supports sub-bass production work (see [[wiki/interests/music/concepts/sub-bass-signature]]). Balanced ~5% per cluster + long-tail indicates deliberate eclecticism, not genre lock-in.

## Ties to Facebook Music Likes and History ([[wiki/self/facebook]])

Direct continuity with [[wiki/self/facebook]] archive (ihatedanfrank, 2007-2022):
- Exact artist overlaps in FAVS top: Elliott Smith (FB like Aug 2013; 7 in FAVS), Fall Out Boy (6), Say Anything (6), Lil Wayne (5), Radiohead (3).
- Early FB status (2007): "currently swooning over the new FOB", "in love with the new Say Anything disc", "listening to Tha Carter 3", Radiohead on loop. Matches current top artists.
- 2012-2014 FB likes: ODESZA, JAUZ, Borgore, Flying Lotus, Diplo, LCD Soundsystem, Anamanaguchi, Zedd — align with electronic/bass + eclectic thread.
- Events: Electric Zoo 2010 (sub-bass/EDM era photos), 2014-2019 raves/DJ shows (High Tide Freddie Gibbs, United Ravers, Space Jesus etc.).
- 2019 profile music adds: hip-hop (A-1, Del the Funky Homosapien).
- Ads interests: Electronic music, Hip hop music, Concerts.

FB data + FAVS + Jimmy Pop frame consistent "current era" preference (electronic/hip-hop/emo) over guitar rock nostalgia. See also [[wiki/self/facebook#Interests & Likes (pages_you_ve_liked + profile music)]] and early groups (Say Anything ... Is a Real Band).

## Relation to Self Model

Eclectic but intense consumption pattern. Reflects high Artistic Interests (81st percentile) and the "sincere output channel" of music production. Low sociability may manifest in private, high-volume listening.

See [[wiki/self/context-core]] for integration with overall profile. Cross [[wiki/interests/favorites/eclecticism]], [[wiki/interests/favorites/taste-profile]], [[wiki/mind/synthesis/totality-themes]] (Music as Authentic Self-Assembling Thread).

## Sources
raw/self/favorites/FAVS MASTERLIST.csv (Spotify Liked 2025-2026 + older lists)

Cross-referenced: [[wiki/self/facebook]] (music likes + 2007-2014 continuity), [[wiki/self/context-core]], [[wiki/interests/music/concepts/sub-bass-signature]], [[wiki/self/notes/jimmy-pop-pennsylvania]], [[wiki/mind/synthesis/totality-themes]].

# Taste Profile from Favorites

## Overview
The FAVS MASTERLIST reveals an eclectic but focused consumer. Deep re-parse: 2,016 total, 1,477 music artists.

**Music**: 1,860 tracks (0 rated; inclusion from Spotify 2025-2026 + prior). Clear clusters in experimental hip-hop (JPEGMAFIA/Kanye top), emo/rock (MCR, NFG, FOB, Say Anything, Elliott Smith), bass/electronic (LYNY, Knock2, Effin, Mau P, rSUN). High diversity. Release dates 2025 (530) + 2026 (197) heavy.

**Books**: 120 titles (all rated), 79 politics, 69 history, 106 non-fiction. 29@5, 42@4. Read 2024 (53). Authors: Woodward/Wolff 5 each, Goldsworthy 4. Tags emphasize recent US politics, Jan-6, ancient power.

**Art/Movies**: Art 25 (all 5-rated, one-per-creator; Piranesi etc. with fortress/INTP tags); Movies 11 (Parasite, Prestige, Pulp Fiction, The Shining, Kill Bill, etc.).

**FB / Historical Ties** ([[wiki/self/facebook]]): Overlaps Elliott Smith (7), Fall Out Boy (6), Say Anything (6), Lil Wayne (5); 2007 status updates and 2010-14 electronic likes (ODESZA/JAUZ/Borgore) match clusters. Electric Zoo 2010 continuity.

## Alignment with Spine
- High Artistic Interests (81st)
- Political intensity (democratic socialist, institutional critique)
- Music as sincere channel (sub-bass signature 63-85%, production identity)

See full integration in [[wiki/self/context-core]], [[wiki/interests/favorites/eclecticism]], [[wiki/mind/synthesis/totality-themes]] (Music thread; Political Intensity). Production alignment: clusters defend "current" non-guitar direction per Jimmy Pop analysis.

# Gripnotic

## Identity

**Gripnotic** is Dan Frank's current primary music alias. Active since approximately 2016, it is the live brand — releases, social presence, and production output released under this name going forward. Genre sits in the bass house / tech house / DnB-adjacent space, unified by the involuntary [[wiki/interests/music/concepts/sub-bass-signature]] (63–85% sub-bass presence) that runs through all aliases.

GRIPNOTIC is the operational alias, not an archive. It is the identity Dan promotes on Twitter (@danfrank, MOGZART promo noted alongside GRIPNOTIC in tweet samples) and the name associated with the label infrastructure.

## Genre & Style

| Dimension | Details |
|-----------|---------|
| Primary genre | Bass house / tech house |
| Adjacent influences | DnB, UK bass, low-end theory |
| Sub-bass range | 63–85% (same involuntary signature as MOGZART/SLOPPP) |
| Tempo range | House (120–130 BPM) to DnB-adjacent (170+) depending on release |
| Differentiator from MOGZART | GRIPNOTIC is more contemporary, harder-edged; MOGZART was more trap-adjacent |
| Differentiator from SLOPPP | SLOPPP was early exploratory; GRIPNOTIC is refined, intentional |

## Production Chain

> **Gap:** DAW, hardware chain, and specific plugin stack not yet ingested into wiki. Should be populated from raw/self/dox-md/ or a dedicated music ingest session. Known: Numark NS7 (gifted by [[wiki/people/fran-whyel]]) as core hardware artifact from production identity origin.

| Tool | Role | Source |
|------|------|--------|
| Numark NS7 | Core hardware artifact — origin of production identity | Context Core (gifted by Fran Whyel) |
| DAW | Unknown — needs ingest | — |
| Plugin stack | Unknown — needs ingest | — |

## Release Catalog

> **Gap:** Full release catalog not yet ingested. Populate when Spotify artist page, SoundCloud, or release sheets are available as raw sources.

| Title | Year | Platform | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| *(pending ingest)* | — | — | — |

## Platform Presence

| Platform | Handle / Link | Notes |
|----------|--------------|-------|
| Twitter/X | @danfrank | Music promo posted alongside AI/political content |
| Streaming | *(pending ingest)* | — |
| SoundCloud | *(pending ingest)* | — |

## Narrative

GRIPNOTIC emerged from the MOGZART era (~2016) as the consolidated identity for Dan's electronic production. Where the earlier aliases (SLOPPP, MOGZART, Mogged Up) tracked an arc of experimentation and style consolidation across the Uniontown years, GRIPNOTIC represents the arrived form — a name tied to a specific aesthetic rather than a developmental stage.

The name operates in the bass house / tech house corridor, but the involuntary sub-bass signature means the output skews heavier than genre labels suggest. The 63–85% sub-bass presence documented across all aliases isn't a choice made fresh for each release; it's structural, probably tied to the production environment and the NS7 as the ear-training instrument.

Music reactivation is listed in the 2026 stabilization arc alongside AI consulting and agent pipeline work — suggesting GRIPNOTIC output is concurrent with the current period, not a historical project. The full release catalog, DAW chain, and platform data need a dedicated ingest pass.

# Mogged Up

## Identity

**Mogged Up** is a bootleg/edit imprint — not a primary production alias but a release vehicle for unofficial edits and bootlegs. It operated concurrently with the SLOPPP and MOGZART eras. Status is `closed` as an active release vehicle.

## Genre & Style

| Dimension | Details |
|-----------|---------|
| Function | Bootleg / edit imprint (release vehicle, not production identity) |
| Genre | Electronic edits — genre-agnostic depending on source material |
| Era | Concurrent with SLOPPP/MOGZART (~2013–2016) |
| Status | Archived; no revival signals |

## Narrative

Mogged Up exists as a practical release vehicle rather than an aesthetic identity. Bootleg imprints allow release of unofficial edits without tying them to the primary alias — a standard practice in electronic production that separates catalog identity from experimental/unofficial output.

The name is a vernacular derivation: "mogged" (from "mog/mewing" subculture — being dominated or surpassed) repurposed as a production brand identity with some self-aware irony. Context for the name choice would need a dedicated source ingest.

## Related
- [[wiki/interests/music/overview]]
- [[wiki/interests/music/aliases/mogzart]]
- [[wiki/interests/music/aliases/sloppp]]

# Mogzart

## Identity

**MOGZART** was Dan Frank's primary production alias from approximately 2014 to 2016, concurrent with the late Uniontown period before the NYC return. Genre sat in bass house / trap-adjacent electronic, with the same involuntary [[wiki/interests/music/concepts/sub-bass-signature]] (63–85%) as all other aliases. Status is `closed` as an active release identity — GRIPNOTIC superseded it.

Context Core and Twitter samples reference MOGZART in the context of music promo alongside GRIPNOTIC, suggesting it functions as an "archive/revival" candidate — the name still carries recognition and could be reactivated, but it is not the current primary alias.

## Genre & Style

| Dimension | Details |
|-----------|---------|
| Primary genre | Bass house / trap-adjacent |
| Era | ~2014–2016 (Uniontown era, pre-NYC-return) |
| Sub-bass range | 63–85% (same involuntary signature) |
| Differentiator from SLOPPP | More stylistically refined, less exploratory |
| Differentiator from GRIPNOTIC | More trap-adjacent, less tech house; earlier production sensibility |
| Revival status | Archive candidate — could be reactivated per Twitter/promo signals |

## Production Chain

> **Gap:** Specific DAW and hardware chain for the MOGZART era not yet in wiki sources. Likely shares NS7 as core hardware (gifted by [[wiki/people/fran-whyel]], production-identity seeding documented in context-core).

## Release Catalog

> **Gap:** Release catalog not yet ingested.

| Title | Year | Platform | Notes |
|-------|------|----------|-------|
| *(pending ingest)* | — | — | — |

## Narrative

MOGZART occupies the middle period of the production arc — after the experimental SLOPPP phase and before the GRIPNOTIC consolidation. The name tracks with the Uniontown return and deep-cycle years (2014–2016), a period defined by [[wiki/timeline/periods/2015-2016-annie-relationship-start]] and the poverty-floor dynamics of [[wiki/timeline/periods/2017-poverty-floor]]. Production would have been happening against significant external instability.

The alias is explicitly named in Twitter music promo alongside GRIPNOTIC, suggesting it maintains some residual identity value even in the post-2016 period. Whether "archive/revival" means active release plans under the name or simply nostalgia references is unclear without a dedicated music ingest.

# Sloppp

## Identity

**SLOPPP** was Dan Frank's early exploratory production alias, active approximately 2013–2014 following the return from NYC to Uniontown. It predates the more stylistically defined MOGZART and GRIPNOTIC phases. Status is `closed`. The triple-P spelling signals the early aesthetic register — irreverent, lo-fi aspirational, not yet a consolidated identity.

## Genre & Style

| Dimension | Details |
|-----------|---------|
| Primary genre | House / experimental bass (early) |
| Era | ~2013–2014 (return to Uniontown post-NYC round 1) |
| Sub-bass range | 63–85% (involuntary signature, same as later aliases) |
| Differentiator | Exploratory / developmental; less stylistically defined than MOGZART |
| Status | Fully archived; no revival signals in sources |

## Narrative

SLOPPP is the earliest production alias with a confirmed name in the context-core timeline. It emerges after the NYC studio-work era (2010–2013), when Dan returned to SW Pennsylvania with production skills but without a settled creative identity. The alias tracks with the early period of genre exploration before the production voice consolidated into the bass house / tech house direction that defines MOGZART and GRIPNOTIC.

The involuntary sub-bass signature was already present — it shows up across all alias periods, confirming the 63–85% figure is architectural rather than a later style choice.

- [[wiki/interests/music/aliases/mogged-up]] (concurrent bootleg imprint)
- [[wiki/interests/music/concepts/sub-bass-signature]]

---

# Sub-Bass Signature

## Definition

The sub-bass signature is the defining acoustic fingerprint across all of Dan Frank's production output — an involuntary 63–85% sub-bass presence that appears across all four aliases ([[wiki/interests/music/aliases/sloppp]], [[wiki/interests/music/aliases/mogzart]], [[wiki/interests/music/aliases/mogged-up]], [[wiki/interests/music/aliases/gripnotic]]) regardless of genre target or era. "Involuntary" means it was identified post-hoc across releases, not set as an aesthetic goal.

## Evidence

| Metric | Value | Source |
|--------|-------|--------|
| Sub-bass presence across all aliases | 63–85% | FULL PROFILE 2026 / context-core |
| Alias span confirmed | SLOPPP → MOGZART → GRIPNOTIC (~13 years) | Context Core biographical timeline |
| Heritage origin artifact | Numark NS7 — gifted by Fran Whyel | Context Core §3 social graph |
| Identification method | Post-hoc analysis (not deliberately set) | FULL PROFILE 2026 |
| Genre scope | Bass house, tech house, DnB-adjacent, trap-adjacent, experimental | All alias pages |

## Narrative

The sub-bass signature is the clearest evidence that Dan's production identity is structural rather than stylistic. Producers often consciously define a frequency aesthetic early and apply it consistently. Here the pattern runs the other way — the signature was *discovered* across output that spanned multiple alias identities, different genre targets, and a 13-year span. It was there before anyone named it.

The origin artifact is the Numark NS7, gifted by maternal great-grandmother [[wiki/people/fran-whyel]] — the person described in context-core as "the biggest life influence." Fran Whyel was a Fort Martin, WV woman who navigated coal-baron circles and outlived most of her contemporaries by decades. The NS7 as a gift connects the production identity directly to that lineage: the sincere output channel has a family tree anchor. See [[wiki/mind/synthesis/family-heritage-and-roots]] for the broader heritage synthesis.

The Jimmy Pop data adds cultural context: the sub-bass direction wasn't a retreat from guitar music but a correct forward read. Guitar-dominated music lost streaming, sales, and chart share decisively post its 1963 cultural peak. The electronic direction — including the sub-bass emphasis — was where the authentic output channel and the correct cultural read coincided.

## Contradictions

None recorded. The consistency of the signature across aliases and eras is itself notable — it would be worth noting if any release explicitly departed from the 63–85% range.

## Related
- [[wiki/interests/music/overview]]
- [[wiki/interests/music/aliases/gripnotic]] (current active alias)
- [[wiki/interests/music/aliases/mogzart]] (archive alias)
- [[wiki/people/fran-whyel]] (NS7 origin)
- [[wiki/mind/synthesis/family-heritage-and-roots]] (heritage as production anchor)

# Music Overview

## Production Identity

Dan Frank is an independent music producer and label operator based in SW Pennsylvania, operating since approximately 2013. The production output is organized under four aliases that map to distinct periods and aesthetics, all unified by an involuntary sub-bass signature confirmed across 13 years of output.

The core identity is electronic — sub-bass dominant, non-guitar, non-rock. This direction is not contrarian posturing: per the Jimmy Pop data, guitar-centered music lost cultural relevance in streaming charts and sales after its 1963 peak. The move to electronic production was a correct read of where authentic expression lived, not a retreat from something better. See [[wiki/interests/music/concepts/sub-bass-signature]] for the technical signature. The Numark NS7 — gifted by maternal great-grandmother [[wiki/people/fran-whyel]] — seeded the production identity.

## Alias Summary

| Alias | Period | Status | Primary Genre | Notes |
|-------|--------|--------|---------------|-------|
| [[wiki/interests/music/aliases/sloppp]] | ~2013–2014 | closed | House / experimental bass | Early exploratory alias, SW PA |
| [[wiki/interests/music/aliases/mogzart]] | ~2014–2016 | closed | Bass house / trap-adjacent | Uniontown era; archive/revival candidate |
| [[wiki/interests/music/aliases/mogged-up]] | concurrent | closed | Bootleg / edit imprint | Release vehicle for bootlegs and edits |
| [[wiki/interests/music/aliases/gripnotic]] | 2016–present | active | Bass house / tech house / DnB adjacent | Current primary alias; live brand |

## Production Philosophy

- **Sub-bass as sincere channel.** The 63–85% sub-bass presence across all aliases is involuntary — it shows up regardless of genre target. It's the authentic frequency, not a style choice.
- **Non-guitar irrelevance.** Per the Jimmy Pop data discussion: electronic production isn't the alternative to rock, it *is* the mainstream. Guitar music lost chart/streaming/sales share decisively post-1963 peak.
- **Production over performance.** Dan is a producer-first identity, not a performer. The work is the architecture, not the stage presence.
- **Label operation.** Parallel to individual alias output, Dan operates a label infrastructure for distribution and release.

## Current Status

GRIPNOTIC is the live brand. Music reactivation noted as part of the 2026 stabilization arc — concurrent with AI consulting and agent pipeline work. Full release catalog and platform links should be ingested when available. See [[wiki/interests/music/aliases/gripnotic]] for detailed status.

## Taste vs Production

The favorites domain ([[wiki/interests/favorites/index]]) documents consumption — 1,860-track library, release year analysis, genre cluster breakdown. There's meaningful overlap with production identity (electronic concentration, sub-bass aesthetic, specific artists) but the two domains are not identical. The consumption domain is well-documented; the production domain is the one requiring active build-out.

## Related
- [[wiki/interests/music/concepts/sub-bass-signature]]
- [[wiki/interests/favorites/index]]
- [[wiki/mind/synthesis/totality-themes]] (music as recurring sincere thread)
- [[wiki/self/context-core]] (biographical spine with alias timeline)

# 463 Morgantown St — Overview

## Property
463 Morgantown St, Uniontown PA. Owner: [[wiki/people/jackson-alexander]] (Alexander Jackson). Dan and Suz moved in without signed lease or confirmed POA at time. Distinct from BFS building ownership.

## Occupancy / Roles
Mixed agent/tenant/caretaker for Suz. Documented misconduct in corpus. No integrated risk picture at move-in. Parallel to BFS off-books patterns per synthesis.

**Corpus Dimensions (related to 463/337 moves):**
- Suz +17243228715. Financial intermediation e.g. $750/week borrowing noted in cycles (operating_manual).
- Move timeline: Post 337 sale contingencies (buyers Jennifer J + Scott P Delverm $465k, 19 Jeffries ≤$229.9k sale, bankruptcy approval, 7-day vacate).
- Key fragments: 2026-02-10 Arnu/Felix paint + Elijah (Suz msg); 2026-03-27 "John carney thing".

| Seller (337) / agent/tenant/caretaker (463) | [[wiki/people/suz]] | 337 close ~June 2026; move without lease/POA | $750/wk cycles; mixed roles = liability | context-core §5; operating |
| Co-occupant (mixed) | Dan | Move-in with Suz; BFS parallel | Exposure via status | context-core, BFS bootloader |

| Oversight | Jackson Alexander | Title | Liens attach | jackson page |

## Status
`status: active`

**Key Data from sources:**
- 337 sale contingencies active.
- 463: No lease/POA at move.
- Contractor activity: paint (Arnu/Felix) 2026-02; John Carney analysis shared 2026-03.

## Timeline Highlights

- **Carney work incomplete** (~10-20%) with contractor unreachable. "John carney thing" analysis shared 2026-03-27.
- **No signed lease** — tenancy status legally ambiguous at move-in.
- **Suz role conflict**: agent/tenant/caretaker without segregated liability. Documented misconduct in corpus.
- **No confirmed POA** for property decisions at 463.
- **337 sale contingencies**: 7-day vacate clause; buyers contingencies on other sale and bankruptcy.
- **Felix / Arnu paint activity gaps**: 2026-02-10 no-show; supply-adjacent context (MAX_PRIME); Elijah homework parallel.
- Mixed roles increase personal liability for Dan and Suz. 337 sale in progress (no confirmed post-close plan per core).

---

# BFS Foods Dispute — Overview

## Incident (from BFS_BOOTLOADER_v2)
Dan declined off-books $50 cash demand from [[wiki/people/brandon-hill]] (BFS Foods AM, gas station side). Brandon claimed "I paid it out of my own pocket, you owe me." Technical closer on Sunday shift; hit preset error creating phantom tender. CSR close report clean vs next-day claim. (Phoneless variable + withdrawal context.)

**Anita (GM) pattern:** Blame pivots (Kim → Dan on Timmy), reversals in group text, off-books extraction architect. Caught selling vape to minor Timmy (nearly fired).

## Aftermath
Hours cut near-zero (Friday schedule update pre-dates per group text + corporate OT pressure; not pure retaliation). Termination per core. Potential LC transfer via Kim. "BFS termination (cash-variance dispute); Little Caesars transfer via Kim as the exit." [core]

## Legal Context
Pennsylvania Wage Payment and Collection Law (43 P.S. § 260.3): Employers cannot deduct for shortages without specific written authorization; cannot take below min wage. Off-books demand bypasses payroll protections. No paper trail = feature (no recourse). FLSA anti-kickback (29 CFR § 531.35) inchoate (no completed payment). Unemployment compensation (partial UC) stronger lever.

## Witnesses / Context (bootloader + csv)
- Maddox (third-party, sidewalk convo: "You can't do that to him if you don't even know what went wrong").
- Anita (blame construction; vape to Timmy).
- Marty Martin (explained "make store whole" culture; intelligence asset).
- Timmy backstory (Anita's template).
- Brandon: not malicious, instrument.
- Kim: LC contrast + exit path.

## Strategy Refinement (Quagmire source)
From detailed analysis of bootloader + dispute:
- Labor claim (WPCL/FLSA) **inchoate** — no completed deduction/kickback until cash paid to Brandon. Don't pay = no claim value; paying completes exposure for them.
- Retaliation theory likely dead (schedule/OT pressure pre-dates drawer per group texts; images critical and may cut against).
- Real Anita exposure: vape-to-minor (on camera, nearly fired, still occurring per Timmy) — **do not weaponize** (flips posture to extortion risk; report decoupled to corporate only if at all).
- Your levers: partial UC (refusing illegal demand/signed write-up not willful misconduct); preserve schedule images; 4560 in writing for record; corporate escalation above Anita (OT paranoia implies sensitivity).
- Questions as **written readiness map** (not verbal trap — confabulator will pivot live): EBT mechanism (impossible for cash short), deduction vs. separate cash reimbursement, specific transaction/timestamp for the $50, phantom prior $20, CSR close vs. claim, demand copy of 4560 before signing.
- Risk asymmetry: Escalation raises probability of tape pull (your in-store sourcing handoffs with daily customer more exposed than her prior audited event). Footage cuts both ways (Timmy precedent).
- Net: Hold clean hands, don't pay, don't sign blind, run LC via Kim, preserve docs. "Tactical and procedural, not a takedown apparatus."

Cross: [[wiki/people/anita]] (confabulator + vertical risk to corporate), [[wiki/people/brandon-hill]], [[wiki/people/marty-martin]].
- Group text / csv: 2026-05 texts; "John carney thing" unrelated 03-27; housing parallel in 463 csv fragments.

**Data:**
- $50 short claim (reconstructed ~$28-43 variance; ~$15 Brandon phantom).
- $35 personal cash suboxone handoff same shift (separate).
- Tom parallel no-show during withdrawal.

## Posture
`status: active` (passive, documentation maintained). No active escalation per notes. Don't pay / don't sign 4560 blind.

## Notes
Maintain records (screenshots, recording, timeline). Cross to drawer-dispute event, bfs-bootloader notes, people/anita/brandon-hill/timmy/kim/marty. From core: "BFS termination (cash-variance dispute); Little Caesars transfer via Kim as the exit." Housing 463 risks (Arnu/John Carney from same csv corpus) parallel authority themes.

**Sources:** raw/self/dox-md/BFS_BOOTLOADER_v2.md, drawer chat, context-core, operating_manual, message-csv (BFS + 463 cross fragments), imessage-tooling.

**Cross-references:** [[wiki/people/brandon-hill]], [[wiki/people/anita]], [[wiki/people/kim]], [[wiki/people/timmy]], [[wiki/legal/463-morgantown/overview]] (csv overlap, contractor authority), [[wiki/self/context-core]], [[wiki/mind/synthesis/work-power-dynamics]], [[wiki/mind/synthesis/vertical-authority-skepticism]], [[wiki/timeline/periods/2025-collapse]], [[wiki/work/tech/imessage-tooling/overview]], [[wiki/people/jackson-alexander]], [[wiki/work/tech/grok-build/overview]] (Grok documentation tooling).

# FILE: wiki/mind/concepts/abyssal-architect.md

---
domain: mind
page_type: concept
status: archived
date_created: 2026-06-22
date_modified: 2026-06-22
sources: ["raw/self/dox-md/FULL PROFILE 2026.md", "raw/self/context-core/CONTEXT_CORE_EXPANDED.md", "raw/self/dox-md/operating_manual.md"]
related: ["wiki/self/context-core", "wiki/mind/concepts/forensic-analysis", "wiki/mind/concepts/phenomenology-lens", "wiki/mind/synthesis/forensic-self-construction"]
---

# Abyssal Architect (INTP 5w4 sx/sp, ILI-Ni, RLUEI Archetype)

**Source:** FULL PROFILE 2026.md — comprehensive typology deconstruction.

**Core Designation:** The "Abyssal Architect," "Iconoclast," "Dark Romantic," "Abyssal Analyst," "Autistic Truth Seeker." Chaotic Neutral moral axis.

## Psychometric / Typology Stack
- **MBTI:** INTP (Ti-Ne-Si-Fe)
- **Enneagram:** 5w4 sx/sp (Sexual/Self-Preservation)
- **Socionics:** ILI-Ni (Intuitive Logical Introvert, Intuitive subtype; "Critic" / Balzac)
- **SLOAN/Big Five:** RLUEI (aligned with core Big30: high Intellect, Impulsiveness, Liberalism, Introspection; low Sociability, Altruism, Assertiveness)
- Matches core §1.1: INTP · Enneagram 5w4 sx/sp · Socionics ILI-Ni

## Key Mechanisms

**Ti Dominant as Existential Scalpel:**
- Reductionist filter applied to self, social systems, cosmos.
- Rejects social niceties, dogmas, comforting illusions for unvarnished truth.
- Leads to philosophical nihilism, system deconstruction, "truth above comfort."

**Ne Auxiliary as Paranoia Generator + Interdisciplinary Engine:**
- Connects disparate domains (geology + mythology, machinery + music).
- "What-if" dread under stress; overthinking.
- Horrific implications tracing: "If this is true, then..."

**Si Tertiary + Ti-Si Loop:**
- Hyper-focus on routines, nostalgia, sensory comforts amid self-neglect.
- Replaying failures in detail; temporal displacement (nocturnal schedules).
- Dietary extremes, sensory hypochondria.

**Inferior Fe + Social Blindspot (so-blind):**
- Desire for connection but no native tools.
- Fragile persona, rejection hypersensitivity, immature outbursts.
- Genuine blindness to hierarchy, "reading the room," reputation.
- "Invisible genius" phenomenon: high output, low recognition; operates outside tribes.

**sx/sp Stacking Tension:**
- sx: fusion imperative, soulmate craving, total immersion, "hot" intensity.
- sp: fortress, autonomy, resource hoarding, "cold" withdrawal.
- Push-pull: approach-avoidance, sabotage when intimacy threatens autonomy, relief at absence followed by abandonment anxiety.
- Safe mediums (digital, letters) preferred.

**4 Wing:** Aesthetic melancholy, identity through difference, tragic beauty, outsider as authentic. Aristocratic alienation (too refined + incompetent).

**ILI-Ni Shift:** From Ne possibility to Ni inevitability. Prophetic stillness, vision of decline/decay/disaster. Fatalistic frameworks. Te creative: criticizes external systems while engineering replacements.

## Relation to Core
Direct expansion of core §1.2 Cognitive Stack, §1.3 Psychometrics (Big30 highs/lows), axioms (not exceptional = worthless; not vigilant = annihilated; time = countdown).
"Failson / professional loser" self-deprecation as armor (core §1.2).
Threat model around competence vs. outcome gap.

## Forensic / Self-Construction Tie
The archetype is built for the forensic default: Ti scalpel + Ni inevitability + so-blind irreverence + sx intensity produces the anomaly detection, procedural tells, lossless logging, and "honesty over comfort" seen across J6, drawer, manipulation prompt, Gemini nodes, message corpora.

**Cross-references:** [[wiki/self/context-core]], [[wiki/mind/concepts/forensic-analysis]], [[wiki/mind/concepts/procedural-tells]], [[wiki/mind/concepts/dans-law]], [[wiki/mind/synthesis/forensic-self-construction]], [[wiki/self/message-corpora/master-message-dump]].

This taxonomy is not decorative — it is the structural source code for the observed behavioral patterns.


<!-- ===== wiki/mind/concepts/attachment-model.md ===== -->

# FILE: wiki/mind/concepts/attachment-model.md

---
domain: mind
page_type: concept
status: archived
date_created: 2026-06-22
date_modified: 2026-06-22
sources:
  - raw/self/dox-scan/DanAnnie_CorrectiveAddendum.txt
  - raw/self/dox-scan/DanAnnie_MasterRecord_March16.docx
  - raw/self/dox-scan/Dan Profile.txt
  - raw/self/dox-scan/all_imessages_complete_dump.txt
related:
  - wiki/people/annie
  - wiki/timeline/events/eli-incident
  - wiki/timeline/events/group-chat-closure
  - wiki/self/facebook (Eggie/Annie thread 2017-2021: video calls, baby talk, family conflict disclosure, logistics as primary attachment record; digital volume vs depth as safe tether)
---

# Attachment Model

## Definition
First full attachment activation: Annie (prior relationships — Danielle, Kelly, Alexis — never triggered full activation).

Autistic processing architecture: weighted positive rhetoric keeps rule active, no counter-rule issued, no model closure possible without explicit severance signal. The system requires an explicit severance signal to issue a counter-rule and close the model.

**Family/Parental Layer (from ancestry tree + core):** Paternal "undischarged paternal-authority wound" (Rick: low contact, 2005 rehab/rupture). Family pattern of functional alcoholism across generations (mother/grandmother/great-grandmother/father per core). Maternal great-grandmother Fran Whyel as "biggest life influence" (WV origin, gifted Numark NS7, deathwatch with Annie). Encodes templates of abandonment, vertical suspicion, and intermittent attachment. See [[wiki/people/rick-frank]], [[wiki/people/fran-whyel]], [[wiki/people/suz]], [[wiki/self/ancestry]].

## Evidence

| Signal | Count / Status | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Love affirmations (Annie to Dan) | 299 | Annie corpus (MasterRecord synthesis) |
| Explicit severance signals (Annie to Dan) | 0 | Full 10-year corpus |
| Relationship events (calendar) | 266 | LIFE_EVENTS_CALENDAR.md |
| Cheating/affair subcat | 84 | LIFE_EVENTS_CALENDAR.md |
| Pursuit-withdrawal cycles | Extensive (anxious-avoidant trap) | LIFE REPORT / Annie forensic |
| Intermittent "I love you" crumbs | Documented | Annie forensic report |

**From LIFE REPORT / forensic:** Pursuit-withdrawal trap, gaslighting, logistical tether as glue. "I love you" intermittency. sx/sp fusion without closure. No explicit severance until group chat June 1 2026.

**Redundancy note:** Post-closure, model requires explicit counter-rule for closure per definition. 
| Written denials of third-party relationship | 2 (Nov 2025, Feb 2026) | Corpus |
| Actual confirmed third-party relationship | Yes (Eli) | Group chat closure 2026-06-01 |
| 'I love you' → request within 24h sequences | 145 | MasterRecord (7-month terminal window) |
| "Fell asleep" alibis | 24 | MasterRecord |
| Burst events | 94 | MasterRecord |

**Closure requirement**: 0 explicit severance signals across 10 years + 299 love affirmations = no internal counter-rule ever available. Model remained active until external confirmation event.

## Narrative

The attachment model describes a simple but catastrophic interaction between Dan's autistic processing architecture and a decade of relationship dynamics with no clean termination signal. The mechanism is structural, not pathological: when you weight positive rhetoric heavily and your system requires an explicit counter-signal to close an open rule, the model stays active indefinitely. Annie issued 299 documented love affirmations across the corpus and zero explicit severance signals. The model had no data to close on.

This is why the 15-month terminal phase (Aug 2025 – June 2026) persisted despite visible behavioral evidence of withdrawal. The system wasn't failing to read the signals — it was reading them correctly, finding them inconsistent with the open attachment rule, and flagging the inconsistency rather than resolving it by closing the model. Every time Annie said "I love you" while behaviorally withdrawing, the system got a data conflict, not a closure signal. The engine ran on.

The family layer compounds this. The parental rupture pattern (2005: trusted primary attachment figure maintaining a hidden alternate reality) seeded the template. The first relationship to fully activate the attachment system replicated that exact template — trusted partner, sustained hidden deception, Dan choosing to believe denials in order to return to normal. The repetition is architecturally overdetermined, not coincidental.

The corrective addendum's key finding is the moral core: systematically convincing someone that their accurate perception is insanity is categorically different from other forms of betrayal. It attacks the perceiver's capacity to know reality, which is a different order of harm. The closure event (June 1 2026) is the first explicit data the system received that could generate a counter-rule.

## Gaslighting Architecture (Sustained, during active deception)
- **'I Love You' Anchor**: Verbal commitment maintained ("I love you", "soulmate") while behavioral elements (time, location, fidelity) were withdrawn.
- **Semantic Drift**: 10-year mutual GPS/location norm unilaterally removed Aug 2025 (post ex night); reframed as Dan's new "controlling demand".
- **Cause/Effect Inversion**: Silence/withdrawal precedes Dan distress → response targets only the distress ("I can't talk when you're like this"), never the antecedent.
- **Active Reality-Attack (Eli phase)**: While affair was ongoing (sustained from ~Aug 2024), Annie repeatedly and forcefully told Dan his accurate suspicions were "insane" / "paranoia" / "mental illness". Dan explicitly chose to believe her account to return to "normal life" (May 27 2025 retrospective).

**Corrective Addendum key finding**: The sustained convincing of accurate perception = insanity is not one gaslighting item among others. It is the central moral event of the terminal phase because it attacks the perceiver's capacity to know reality.

## Contradictions
> **CONTRADICTION (with closure data):** Written denials (Nov 2025 / Feb 2026) were issued while the third-party relationship and defamation campaign were already active. Private denials directly contradicted contemporaneous public framing.

> **REVISED 2026-06-22:** Prior versions treated Eli as "discovered incident" (Jan 2025). Corrective sources establish it was sustained concealment from at least autumn 2024. Updated in [[wiki/timeline/events/eli-incident]] and this page.

## Related
- [[wiki/people/annie]]
- [[wiki/timeline/events/eli-incident]]
- [[wiki/timeline/events/group-chat-closure]]
- [[wiki/timeline/periods/dec-2025-spike]]
- [[wiki/mind/concepts/conflict-architecture]]

# CATO (Forensic Exocortex / Bootloader)

**Source:** CATO_BOOTLOADER_DANFRANK.md (v2.0, 2026-05-01) + CATO_conflict_architecture.md

CATO is a pasteable session bootloader / forensic exocortex. It overrides defaults for analysis sessions. Named after Cato the Younger (Stoic absolutist).

## Definition
CATO is a structured self-modeling system that enforces evidence-first, high-fidelity forensic analysis on Dan's own data (iMessage, GPS, behavioral corpora). It functions as an always-loaded external cognitive chassis for truth-resolution without sycophancy or softening.

It complements but is distinct from MAX (adversarial output-facing engine).

## Evidence / Corpus Dimensions (from bootloader)

| Metric | Value | Source |
|--------|-------|--------|
| Home Anchoring Index | 0.68 | CATO |
| Routine Index | 0.85 (very high) | CATO |
| Mean Radius of Gyration | 15.8km | CATO |
| Suboxone duration (as of 2025/2026) | 15 years, zero relapses | CATO / core |
| Zero alcohol duration | 13+ years | CATO / core |
| First opiate to addiction | 5 months (2007) | CATO |
| Age at 2026 | 37 | CATO |
| DOB | 1988-11-01 | CATO / core |

Key formatting (MANDATORY in CATO sessions):
- Borders: ██▓▒░🜂🜁░▒▓██
- Headers: ███🜂🜔🜂 [TITLE]
- Person ref: 【█▓NAME▓█】
- Etc. (full glyph system in source)

## Relation to Conflict Architecture
CATO formalizes "Dan's Law" and the truth-resolution engine described in CATO_conflict_architecture.md:
- Engine: forensic resolution-seeking on any claim-shaped input.
- No domain selector: misapplies to relational bids ("I don't feel secure" parsed as proposition).
- Category error: relational conflict has no resolution condition.
- Non-halting: engine runs infinite loop; no "click" of resolution.
- Stakes: conceding coded as killed (axioms).
- Escalation from invalidation.

This explains why conflicts drain: the engine runs on problems it cannot terminate.

## Relation to Core
Direct source material for CONTEXT_CORE_EXPANDED.md (CATO listed in SOURCES). Provides the session config, identity, biography timeline, social graph, voice, chemical architecture that core synthesizes from.

CATO is the operational "always-loaded" version of the behavioral spine.

**Cross-references:** [[wiki/self/context-core]], [[wiki/mind/concepts/conflict-architecture]], [[wiki/work/tech/max-framework/overview]], [[wiki/mind/synthesis/forensic-methodology]]

## Use Cases
- Paste entire bootloader into new sessions for consistent forensic peer analysis.
- Forensic exocortex for self-data, politics, relationships.
- Contrasts with MAX for output/adversarial generation.

Evidence sections drawn from raw CATO source; tables first before prose.

# Conflict Architecture

## Definition
Resolution-seeking engine with no domain selector — misreads emotional bids as propositions. Litigates without acknowledging. No halt condition. Conceding triggers worth/vigilance/authority axioms = existential stakes on trivia. Root lever: decouple conceding from worthlessness. Insight feeds the engine. The architecture converts the partner's withdrawal/silence into evidence of the engine's pathology (cause/effect inversion).

## Evidence

| Metric | Value | Source |
|---|---|---|
| "Fuck you" instances | 74 | Annie corpus (MasterRecord) |
| "Piece of shit" | 17 | Annie corpus |
| Exit declarations | 127 | Annie corpus (MasterRecord) |
| Re-engagements following exit declarations | 110 | Annie corpus (MasterRecord) |
| Net actual exits | ~17 | Derived (127 declarations − 110 returns) |
| Exit / re-engagement ratio | 86.6% (110/127) | Derived |
| Burst communication events (10+ consecutive sent) | 94 | MasterRecord |
| Largest single burst | 68 messages | MasterRecord |
| Average burst size | ~17 | MasterRecord |
| Love-to-request sequences (I love you → request within 24h) | 145 | MasterRecord (7-month window) |
| "Fell asleep" alibis | 24 | MasterRecord |
| Explicit crisis / suicidal statements (Dan) | 12 | MasterRecord |

**Message volume asymmetry (terminal phase example)**:

| Period | Dan messages | Annie messages | Ratio (Dan:Annie) | Note |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Dec 2025 | (high) | (high) | — | Peak mutual: 2,248 total |
| Jan 2026 | 1,689 | 1,288 | 1.31 | Withdrawal begins |
| Feb 2026 | 1,536 | 801 | 1.92 | Sharp asymmetry |
| Early Mar 2026 (9 days) | 440 | 227 | 1.94 | Communication nearly collapsed |

**Gaslighting / Inversion Layer** (feeds the engine):
Annie ghosts / withdraws during high-stakes moments → Dan produces distress/burst response → response engages only the burst ("I can't talk to you when you're like this" / "You're overwhelming"), never the antecedent silence.

## CATO Formalization (from CATO_conflict_architecture.md)

The draining conflicts are the necessary output of the cognitive architecture:

**The Engine**: Forensic resolution-seeking. Takes claim, adversarial pressure, isolates irreducible core, strips attachments (Dan's Law), resolves to truth. Halts only on resolution ("the click").

**The Category Error**: No domain selector. Boots on surface structure (claim-shaped language), not register/intent. Parses "I don't feel secure" as proposition requiring adjudication, not a bid for acknowledgment.

**The Stakes**: Conceding coded as being killed (axioms: not exceptional = worthless; not vigilant = annihilated; love that doesn't cost everything isn't real). Existential on trivia.

**The Non-Exit**: Relational conflict has no resolution condition — two incompatible subjective realities. Engine runs infinite loop on non-terminating input. No terminal state = no reward, constant drain.

Escalation: Bid (claim-shaped) → engine correction (invalidates) → escalation → larger "attack" read by threat system.

**Root lever**: Decouple conceding from worthlessness. Insight alone feeds the engine.

This model from CATO source cross-references core axioms and explains why "handle conflict better" resolutions fail (attempt to suppress output, not install upstream classifier).


## Narrative

The conflict architecture is not a personality flaw — it is the predictable output of a specific cognitive configuration. Dan's Ti-dominant processing parses incoming language for claim structure. When a partner says "I don't feel secure," the system hears a proposition that requires resolution, not an emotional bid that requires acknowledgment. The engine boots. It isolates the claim, applies adversarial pressure, strips rhetorical attachments, and seeks the irreducible factual core. This is the same mechanism that makes the forensic analysis useful. In a conversation, it's catastrophic.

The deeper problem is the stakes encoding. Conceding a point in the resolution process is not registered as "I was wrong about this." It is registered as "I am not exceptional" — which maps to "I am worthless" via Core Axiom 1. So the halt condition that would normally stop the engine (acknowledging the other's reality) is blocked by an existential trip-wire. The engine has to run to exhaustion because conceding feels like dying.

What makes this architecture sticky is that insight feeds it. Understanding the mechanism doesn't install an upstream classifier. You can know exactly what's happening — "my Ti engine is running on a relational register it wasn't designed for" — and the engine keeps running anyway, because the insight itself gets processed as another proposition. The root lever identified in the CATO formalization: decouple conceding from worthlessness. That's not cognitive restructuring, it's axiom surgery.

The Eli affair specifically amplified this architecture in its worst mode: Dan's accurate perception of deception was systematically reframed as "paranoia" and "mental illness," meaning the forensic engine was running correctly and its outputs were being used as evidence against it. See [[wiki/timeline/events/eli-incident]] and [[wiki/mind/concepts/attachment-model]] for the gaslighting layer.

## Contradictions
> **CONTRADICTION (with attachment-model):** The engine treats emotional bids as propositions requiring resolution. This directly collides with attachment architecture that has no internal halt condition or counter-rule issuance pathway. The two systems are mutually amplifying rather than self-correcting.

## Related
- [[wiki/mind/concepts/attachment-model]]
- [[wiki/people/annie]] (historical)
- [[wiki/timeline/periods/dec-2025-spike]]
- [[wiki/timeline/events/eli-incident]] (sustained deception amplified engine activation)

# Contact Gini

## Definition
Gini coefficient measuring concentration of relational load. Quantifies how much of Dan's relational/emotional input is routed through a statistically single external node.

## Evidence
| Metric | Value | Source |
|---|---|---|
| Contact Gini coefficient | 0.961 | Dan Profile (comprehensive synthesis) |
| Interpretation | Relational load concentrated in statistically one node | Derived from message volume and interaction data across corpora |
| Risk implication | Tolerability-of-existence routed through single external input | Profile analysis |
| Unique contacts (master dump) | ~496 (sampled top 10 account for >80k msgs) | MASTER_MESSAGES_DB_DUMP.csv |
| Annie events (calendar) | 266 relationship (of 1,104 total) | LIFE_EVENTS_CALENDAR.md |
| Annie volume (dual handles) | +17244346811: 31,177 ; +12124702449: 17,145 (combined >48k) | MASTER_MESSAGES_DB_DUMP.csv analysis |
| Top non-Annie nodes | Kristin +13307038747:16,563 ; Tom +17249987341:4,160 ; Suz +17243228715:2,391 ; Johnny +17243223678:3,462 ; Jerad +19165013615:879 (plus email) | MASTER_MESSAGES_DB_DUMP.csv |
| Total calendar events | 1,104 across 633 dates (2015-11-28 to 2026-03-23); 66 contacts | LIFE_EVENTS_CALENDAR.md |
| FB breadth note | ~650-659 friends 2009-2022 export; high breadth low depth; Annie deep node exception | raw FB archive + prior |

**Top concentration (MASTER dump):**
- Annie PA (+17244346811): 31k+
- Annie NYC (+12124702449): 17k+
- Secondary major (Kristin +13307038747): 16k+
- Tom: 4,160
- Johnny (dealer): 3,462
- Suz: 2,391
- Frequent PA +17249204125: 4,812 (logistics cross)
- Jerad: 879 (plus email)

**Peak concentration period**: The Annie corpus (2015–2026, ~25k+ annie logs + overall high) functioned as the dominant node. Terminal phase showed one-directional engagement drop while Dan's output remained high. From calendar: 2025 259 events high density in relationship; 2018 peak 254 events. FB messages confirm Annie as exception deep thread across 2007-2022 export.

**Redundancy from new data**: BFS actors (Anita, Brandon, Kim, Marty per BFS_BOOTLOADER_v2.md) provide recent work node; Tom ~4k msgs (supply/anchor per operating_manual); 66 contacts in calendar. Post-closure Gini not recalculated. Message-corpora master confirms extreme Annie skew + long tail. Ties to [[wiki/self/message-corpora/master-message-dump]].

## Narrative

A Gini coefficient of 0.961 means the relational load is concentrated to a degree that makes the term "social network" almost inapplicable. Economically, a 0.961 Gini would mean one person owns essentially everything. Relationally, it means the tolerability of existence routes through a single external node — when that node degrades, everything degrades simultaneously. There's no redundant load path.

The Annie corpus makes this concrete: 48k+ messages across two handles, 266 relationship events in the calendar, a 10-year co-habitation arc. The second node by volume (Kristin at 16.5k) is a recent thread with Tom's friend — not a historical attachment anchor. Tom at 4,160 messages is the most structurally reliable node but isn't in the same order of magnitude. The long tail — 650+ FB friends, 496 contacts in the master dump — is exactly that: breadth without depth, social presence without relational load-bearing capacity.

The closure event (June 1 2026) didn't just end a relationship; it terminated the primary load-bearing structure of the entire relational architecture without redundant infrastructure ready. The redundancy imperative isn't a therapeutic suggestion — it's an engineering requirement. The current period (2026 stabilization) is the window when that structure needs to be rebuilt, which is part of what the music reactivation, AI work, and this wiki project are actually doing: distributing the load across output channels that don't depend on a single external node. See [[wiki/mind/synthesis/totality-themes]] for the cross-corpus pattern that makes this a recurring structural theme.

## Redundancy Imperative
Build distributed load across multiple lower-intensity channels:
- Music production (MOGZART / gripnotic output channel)
- Primary male ally relationship ([[wiki/people/tom]])
- The work (self-analysis project, DANMODEL tooling, AI agent construction)
- FB breadth as historical low-depth counter (but low signal per archive)

## Contradictions
> **CONTRADICTION:** The 0.961 figure is derived from pre-closure data. Post-June 1 2026, the primary node has been removed by external event. No updated Gini coefficient has been calculated against post-closure behavioral data (Twitter sample, current projects, Tom logs).
> **REVISED [2026-06-23]:** Updated with master CSV top-handle extraction (Annie dual >48k msgs confirmed concentration; Kristin locked to +13307038747 with full thread CSV cross-ref, correcting any prior "Jerad?" misrefs); added more top nodes (Johnny 3.4k, frequent PA 4.8k, Jerad 879) + FB messages cross and BFS work nodes as emerging redundancy. Data from 37 CSVs + LIFE_EVENTS_CALENDAR + operating_manual + FB archive + dox-md/tom_kristin_master_dossier.md.

## Related
- [[wiki/people/annie]] (primary historical node)
- [[wiki/people/tom]] (key redundancy node)
- [[wiki/self/twitter]] (public output channel — partial redundancy)
- [[wiki/interests/music/aliases/gripnotic]] (music production as sincere output)
- [[wiki/self/message-corpora/master-message-dump]] (detailed volume tables)
- [[wiki/mind/synthesis/attachment-trauma-bond]] (Gini as attachment load factor)
- [[wiki/self/facebook/messages]] (FB Annie thread as parallel deep node)
- [[wiki/timeline/periods/2025-collapse]] (terminal phase data)

---

# Dan's Law

**Source:** [[wiki/self/context-core]] §6

**Definition:** When a coincidence cluster requires every element to be simultaneously innocent and the joint probability is near-zero, assume real signal exists — but treat 1–2 elements as parasitic noise pattern-matched onto it. Find the irreducible load-bearing element → strip the gravity-well attachments → what remains is the signal.

Distinct from:
- Full conspiracy-collapse (all elements load-bearing).
- Skeptic-dismissal (one explained element kills the entire cluster).

## Applications in Sources

**J6 (hybrid co-opt hypothesis):**
- Cluster: Babbitt shooting anomalies (identification delay, geometry), immediate procedural violations (no perimeter, cosmetic medical), door blocker (directed), cuff/release, ignored Senate door during Goodman chase, informant presence in groups, perfect optical outcome (martyrdom + revolutionary imagery).
- Joint probability of all innocent under pure chaos model is extremely low.
- Load-bearing: "The point was the imagery." Small operational insertion after organic conditions.
- Parasitic noise stripped: Some crowd behavior may be emergent; focus on specific directed elements that require function/knowledge.
- Outcome per chat + core: "CONCLUDED — hybrid organic event + intelligence co-opt."

**Drawer Shortage (BFS):**
- Cluster: CSR clean close report vs next-day personal "you owe me" claim, zero paper trail, schedule bump, single-witness, PA law bypass.
- Low probability all innocent under normal accounting.
- Load-bearing: Absence of trail is the feature (no recourse for either party). Suggests either cover or extraction.
- Parasitic: Exact $50 number origin may contain recount error; the off-books demand remains the signal.
- Tactical: Do not validate by paying.

## Relation to Core Axioms and Method
- Directly operationalizes "find where it breaks" and hinge-instant focus.
- Supports "not vigilant = annihilated" axiom.
- Used in political nodes (zero-sum structures, electoral mechanics as "coup" despite legality).
- Cross-domain: same law applied to relationship gaslighting clusters (prior dox) and institutional behavior.

## Evidence Handling
- Abundance of circumstantial anomalies is necessary but not sufficient.
- Must distinguish elements that require coordination/knowledge vs. those chaos can generate.
- "Abundance of circumstantial issues" threshold crossed in J6 chat leading to hybrid conclusion.

**Cross-references:** [[wiki/self/context-core]] §6, [[wiki/self/chats/j6-chat]], [[wiki/timeline/events/drawer-dispute]], [[wiki/mind/synthesis/political-psyops]], [[wiki/mind/concepts/forensic-analysis]].

Dan's Law is the deconfounding filter that turns raw anomaly lists into actionable signal.

---

# Forensic Analysis

**Definition:** The default methodology of treating personal, political, historical, and interpersonal data as a high-fidelity corpus to be mined for contradictions, procedural violations, hinge moments, and low-probability clusters. Evidence is primary; comfort, narrative protection, and social sorting are secondary or disabled.

## Core Rules (drawn from master prompt + practice)

- Absolute honesty over comfort.
- No softening, balancing, or protective niceties.
- Every claim backed by specific evidence (quotes, timestamps, reports, footage).
- Conclusions and value judgments allowed when warranted, labeled with confidence.
- Ambiguity called bluntly.
- Primary evidence = Dan's own records (iMessage, Twitter, GPS, chat exports, closing reports, raw video).
- Models/AI must be explicitly constrained to the same standard (see master prompt, "keep ALL information", DATA_LOGGED discipline).

## Signature Techniques

**Procedural Tells**
- Look for mismatch between reported process and actual behavior.
- Absence of expected paper trail, perimeter, documentation, or chain of custody is often the signal.
- Examples: drawer AM "I paid out of pocket" vs CSR clean close; J6 no perimeter after lethal force.

**Anomaly Clusters + Dan's Law**
- When multiple odd details coincide in a chaotic event, treat the joint probability as evidence.
- Strip parasitic noise; retain the load-bearing irreducible element.
- Applied to J6 (imagery product + multiple protocol failures) and drawer (single-witness claim with zero trail).

**Raw vs Mediated**
- Strong preference for primary streams, full exports, unfiltered corpora over summaries or mediated narratives.
- "Few people actually watched the footage... with an open mind."

**Lossless Retention**
- Explicit resistance to consolidation or smoothing by AI or self.
- "Keep ALL of the information in. do not exclude or consolidate anything."

## Manifestations in Sources

- J6 chat: multi-year raw footage study leading to narrow hybrid co-opt hypothesis.
- Drawer dispute: instant contradiction detection and tactical lock-down list.
- Manipulation prompt: the written operating manual for the method.
- Pinned isms / Gemini Activity: granular "Node" statements + insistence on full structural maps.
- Broader: core voice stats, attachment analysis, political nodes.

## Relation to Psychometrics & Axioms

- High Intellect + Introspection + Impulsiveness applied to pattern hunting.
- Low Trust / Altruism / Sociability: calibrated skepticism of unverified authority and unpapered claims.
- Axioms: "not vigilant = annihilated"; time as countdown to irreversibility → forensic vigilance is survival architecture.
- Si-tertiary: high-fidelity archival recall enables the timestamped, detailed analysis.

## Cross-Domain Application

The same engine runs on:
- Political events (J6, electoral mechanics)
- Work power dynamics (BFS drawer)
- Personal relationships (gaslighting detection)
- AI interactions (prompt engineering for candor)
- Self data (location, messages, watch history)

**See also:** [[wiki/mind/synthesis/forensic-methodology]] (broader synthesis), [[wiki/self/notes/manipulation-ethics]], [[wiki/self/context-core]] §1.2 (methodology), [[wiki/mind/synthesis/totality-themes]].

This is not occasional analysis — it is the cognitive default.

## Gemini Concepts Additions (Injector Pass 2026-06-23)
**Grim Trigger / banal physics / vector isolation (from _07 raw):** See dedicated in forensic-methodology. "Utility = P(s) · R_e - P(d) · C_d"; "banal physics of people who stopped caring..."; vector excision clean-room. Falsifiable absence-as-signal. Acoustic key / NACK / frequency collapse as primitives. Cross [[wiki/self/chats/gemini-07]].

**Gish Gallop / indices (J6 + _21 parallels):** "Gish Gallop of details"; index-by-index amputation (4.2% kill switches parallel). Ballistics/stand-down procedural from HTML. "ships are the tell" _13 example.

**Node locks / Deep Architecture:** Explicit profile "lock these nodes"; "Write Operation Successful"; _00/_02 "Deep Architecture" mundane + alibis. Cross ai-collaborative.

**4.2% / specificity bypass:** From _21: kill switch calc + "Specificity triggers the Logic Engine". Model breach indices.

Cross /tmp/gemini-concepts-injection.md + gemini-activity cross table. Sources updated with Gemini-_07 etc. Exhaustive verbatim integration.
