related: ["wiki/people/suz", "wiki/self/ancestry", "wiki/self/overview", "wiki/interests/favorites/music", "wiki/mind/concepts/attachment-model", "wiki/mind/synthesis/family-heritage-and-roots", "wiki/people/annie"]
---

# Frances "Fran" Thomas Whyel Coldren

## Identity
Maternal great-grandmother (Whyel line) of Dan Frank. Born 15 August 1920, Fort Martin, West Virginia. Died 4 April 2018, Uniontown, Fayette County, Pennsylvania. Self-described as Dan's **biggest life influence**. Dirt-poor WV origins; coal-baron marriage; later third husband a 33rd-degree Mason. Reportedly dated Arnold Palmer. Gifted the Numark NS7 DJ controller to Dan.

> **[AGE DISCREPANCY — verify against primary source]:** Context-core says "d. April 2018, age 98." GEDCOM primary source gives birth date Aug 15, 1920, which makes her 97 at April 4, 2018 death (she would have turned 98 in August 2018). Either (a) the 1920 birth date is correct and she died at 97, or (b) her birth year was 1919 and the GEDCOM has an error. The wiki used 1920 per the GEDCOM. User should verify against Herald-Standard obituary or FindAGrave which may carry the definitive year.

## Timeline
- **1920-08-15**: Born Fort Martin, WV.
- **1920s-1930s**: Early residences WV (Adkin, McDowell Co.; Cass, Monongalia).
- **~1940**: Married (Smithfield, Fayette Co. PA area); moved into PA.
- **1957-1959**: Travel records (Miami Beach / arrivals).
- **1961**: Belmont Circle, Uniontown.
- **1990s-2010s**: Uniontown PA.
- **2018-04-04**: Death, Uniontown. Obituaries in Herald-Standard; Find A Grave memorial.

## Notes
Core: "Dirt-poor WV origin → coal-baron marriage → 33rd-degree-Mason third husband; reportedly dated Arnold Palmer. Gifted the Numark NS7. Seven-day deathwatch with Annie the only two present throughout." Ties directly to music production identity (Numark as entry to DJing/electronic) and attachment/relationship themes (deathwatch shared with Annie during terminal phase).

Multi-generational family entanglement noted in core (grandmothers neighbors 50+ years with Annie's family).

**Sources in Raw:** GEDCOM with 1920/1930/1940 censuses, passenger manifests, yearbooks, Pittsburgh Post-Gazette, Herald-Standard obits, FindAGrave. CONTEXT_CORE (influence narrative).

## Related
- [[wiki/self/ancestry]] (maternal Whyel line extraction)
- [[wiki/interests/favorites/music]] or [[wiki/interests/music/overview]] (Numark NS7 connection to sub-bass / production)
- [[wiki/people/annie]] (deathwatch)
- [[wiki/mind/concepts/attachment-model]] (influence and family mythos)
- [[wiki/self/context-core]] (heritage and pivotal life figure)

# Jackson Alexander (Alexander Jackson)

**Role:** Owner of 463 Morgantown St, Uniontown PA. Landlord / property owner for Dan + Suz move-in (caretaker/agent mixed role for Suz).

## Roles & Ties Table

| Entity | Role at 463 | Dates/Evidence | Financial/Legal Ties | Source |
|--------|-------------|----------------|----------------------|--------|
| Alexander Jackson (Jackson Alexander) | Owner / lessor | Move-in ~early 2026 (post 337 contingencies); no signed lease/POA at entry | Property title holder; potential lease/POA counterparty. Separate from BFS corp (building ownership distinct) | [[wiki/legal/463-morgantown/overview]], operating_manual, context-core |
| Suz | Seller (337) / agent/tenant/caretaker (463) | 337 sale ~June 2026 (buyers Delverm $465k + Jeffries); 7-day vacate | Borrowing patterns ($750/wk cycles); mixed roles increase liability | raw/self/context-core/CONTEXT_CORE_EXPANDED.md §5; operating_manual |
| Dan | Co-occupant (mixed) | Move with Suz; parallel BFS work | No direct title; exposure via mixed agent/tenant status | BFS_BOOTLOADER (housing background), context-core |
| Arnu | Contractor (paint/mech work) | 2026-02-10 mention (no-show for paint); lien deadline ~2026-07-27 | Mechanics lien risk | message-csv 2026-02-10; timeline |
| John Carney | Contractor | ~10-20% complete, unreachable | Incomplete work exposure | timeline, risks; "John carney thing" ref in Suz msg 2026-03-27 |
| Felix | Worker/painter (supply-adjacent?) | 2026-02-10: showed for paint/homework with Elijah | N/A documented | message-csv Suz: "Felix showed up but Arnu didn’t... Felix is going to paint more" |

## Timeline Snippets (from sources)

- ~2026 pre-June: Move-in to 463 Morgantown by Dan + Suz (no signed lease or confirmed POA at entry). [[wiki/legal/463-morgantown/timeline]]
- 2026-02-10: Arnu/Felix paint activity at property referenced in Suz comms (Elijah homework context).
- ~2026-03-27: "John carney thing" analysis shared with Suz.
- 2026-06: 337 Saratoga sale contingencies close (no confirmed post-close plan per core).
- ~2026-07-27: Arnu mechanics lien deadline (critical risk node).
- Ongoing: Elev8 remodel unrelated (BFS building).

## Behavioral / Core Notes

From [[wiki/self/context-core]]: 337 sale drives move; "no post-close plan". Mixed roles at 463 amplify vertical authority and low-trust patterns (Big30 Trust 9). Ties to synthesis [[wiki/mind/synthesis/work-power-dynamics]] and [[wiki/mind/synthesis/vertical-authority-skepticism]] (housing as extension of off-books / caretaker ambiguities parallel BFS extraction).

Owner communications TBD per timeline. Property separate from BFS (gas/LC building ownership).

**Cross-references:** [[wiki/legal/463-morgantown/overview]], [[wiki/people/suz]], [[wiki/people/arnu]], [[wiki/people/john-carney]], [[wiki/self/context-core]], [[wiki/mind/synthesis/vertical-authority-skepticism]], [[wiki/timeline/periods/2025-collapse]], [[wiki/self/facebook]] (recent activity/ingest), [[wiki/legal/bfs-dispute/overview]] (parallel disputes).

# Jacob Bacharach

## Identity

Jacob Bacharach — Uniontown-raised novelist (*The Bend of the World*, 2014) and Chapo Trap House guest, a childhood neighbor of the Frank family from the Saratoga Drive area. As a teenager he was hired by Dan's father Rick Frank to act in a commercial for the family auto-parts store, and Dan remains in intermittent contact with him. He is significant to the self-model less as an active relationship than as the subject of the "Bacharach coincidence chain" — the most fully worked example of Dan's forensic analytic engine applied to his own hometown, reconstructed at length in [[wiki/self/chats/gemini-13]]. There is no message corpus; all detail comes from that Gemini session and the context core.

## The Coincidence Chain

The short version: while living in New York, Dan heard Bacharach as a podcast guest via YouTube autoplay, recognized the name as a hometown neighbor, and eventually read his novel — where he found the book's bleak rental house mapped onto a real property his own mother had owned.

| Element | What the analysis established |
|---------|-------------------------------|
| The house | *The Bend of the World* describes a rental on "Virginia Avenue" backing onto the fifth fairway of the Uniontown Country Club, with glazed brick and mismatched rooflines. 155 Virginia Ave is the only house on that street with a direct country-club property line — the house [[wiki/people/suz]] owned and where Dan and [[wiki/people/annie]] lived for about three years (~2012–2015), during the same window the book was written and published. |
| The correction | Dan corrected the AI's early over-reach: the Bacharachs never lived in that house — Bacharach only used its exterior. The nautical-themed kitchen the book describes was invented; only the "cover art" (the curb view) is real. The AI's framing: "you lived in the cover art, not the crime scene." |
| The prior link | The strongest improbability is not geographic but the pre-existing economic tie — Bacharach was on Rick Frank's payroll as a teen actor years before any of the real-estate overlap. |
| External verification | Father Paul Bacharach confirmed as president/CEO of Uniontown Hospital (1992–2013); brother Nate Bacharach confirmed deceased July 30, 2009. Both check out against public record. |

## Narrative

This chain is the flagship exhibit for [[wiki/mind/synthesis/forensic-methodology]]: it shows the full method in motion — a specific anomaly, iterative correction of the AI's hypotheses against ground truth ("the ships are the tell"; "the exterior shell"), external asset verification, and a final ranked list of what was actually improbable. It is also a clean case for [[wiki/mind/synthesis/ai-collaborative-analysis]], because the useful output only emerged through Dan repeatedly overriding the model's confident-but-wrong early theories rather than accepting them.

The AI's summarizing line captures why the episode stuck: that Dan "had to move to NYC to get served a podcast by an algorithm that randomly selected the one guy who used your mom's rental property as a literary prop, simply because he thought the brick looked ugly from the street." Dan frames the whole thing in his recurring "Rust Belt simulation" idiom — the sense that the local layer and the national-culture layer clipped through each other — but the durable content here is the demonstration of the method, not the metaphysics.

## Timeline

| Date | Event |
|------|-------|
| Teen years (pre-2009) | Bacharach acts in Rick Frank's auto-parts commercial |
| ~2008–2010 | Suz buys 155 Virginia Ave (before the book was written) |
| ~2012–2015 | Dan and Annie live at 155 Virginia Ave; the novel is written and published (2014) |
| ~2022 | In NYC, Dan hears Bacharach on Chapo via autoplay, recognizes him, re-establishes contact |
| ~2025 | Dan finally reads the book and identifies the house; the forensic analysis follows |

## Related

[[wiki/self/chats/gemini-13]] · [[wiki/mind/synthesis/forensic-methodology]] · [[wiki/mind/synthesis/ai-collaborative-analysis]] · [[wiki/self/context-core]] · [[wiki/people/suz]] · [[wiki/people/annie]] · [[wiki/timeline/periods/2015-2016-annie-relationship-start]]

# Jerad Friedline

**Role / Relationship:** Childhood friend from Uniontown PA, now Sacramento. Married (Rachel, Jewish), one daughter. Runs an e-commerce business. "First-call" friend for political and financial events. (Spelling variants in raw: "Friedline" in FB export, "Friendline" in core docs — using FB primary for title.)

## Key Attributes [DOC]
- Political mirror: Both arrived at reluctant Trump fascination from Bernie starts.
- Financial: Gave the FSLY tip (Sept 2020). Dan dumped portfolio in on advice; ~$4k gains then losses on other calls (CCIV).
- Gap-resilient: 3-year silence (2021–2024) evaporated instantly on major events (Trump shooting, Biden dropout, GME).
- Last documented exchange: AI-TTS file "josh brannan is innocent.wav" (sacred joke).
- Other anecdotes: OutKast "Chonkyfire" permanently linked to Jerad's HS girlfriend Mary Wilson. Predicted Roe v Wade repeal May 2020 (two years early). Invented "LOSE IT" fake investment service that restricts access to prevent panic-trading.

## Evidence from Corpora
- iMessage mentions (e.g. 2018-2019 references to sending carts, "that’s my friend jerad in california").
- High trust / low-frequency high-signal contact.

## Connections
- Ties to core financial-market era, political nodes.
- Cross to message corpora (Jerad thread as proxy for non-crisis baseline register).
- Potential overlap with FB friends list (Jerad names in 2009-2022 network).

## Corpus Dimensions (Jerad)
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Total messages (master) | 879 (handle +19165013615) |
| Email | jfriedline@gmail.com (~low volume) |
| Date range | 2018+ sampled (gap-resilient 2021-24 silences) |
| Rank | ~15th in top handles |
| Key event volume | FSLY tip Sep 2020 (~112 shares; ~$4k+ gains lore); political bursts (Trump shooting etc.) |

# John Carney

**Role:** Contractor at 463 Morgantown St. Unreachable; work ~10-20% complete. Parallel mentions of Carney's Auto Repair Services in location history (possible variant or same network).

## Roles, Dates, Evidence, Ties Table

| Aspect | Details | Evidence/Date | Financial/Legal Ties | Source |
|--------|---------|---------------|----------------------|--------|
| 463 Contractor | General work (incomplete); unreachable | ~10-20% complete (per 463 timeline); status as of ~2026-03 | Exposure via incomplete performance on property | [[wiki/legal/463-morgantown/timeline]], risks.md |
| "John carney thing" | Prior analysis / dossier shared | 2026-03-27: Suz: "I just read the John carney thing. Did you read it? The last few pages are Very interesting." | Indicates forensic review (messages corpus) | raw message-csv 2026-03-27 |
| Other Carney refs | "So Carney got pulled over on his way back from here..."; "giving john carney a fucking neck massage" | 2025-03-09 (pulled over); 2025-05-28 (massage context) | N/A direct tie to 463 | imessages_2124702449_last6months.csv |
| Location variant | Carney's Auto Repair Services | 2019-02 visits | Possible auto services network | Location Semantic History |
| Owner context | Oversight by Jackson Alexander | 463 property | Liens/work attach to title | [[wiki/people/jackson-alexander]] |
| Parallel Arnu | Co-contractor activity | 2026-02-10 paint refs | Lien deadline shared risk | arnu page, message-csv |

## Timeline Snippets

- 2025-03/05: Early Carney mentions in personal messages (pullover, massage context -- may be separate).
- 2026-02-10: Arnu/Felix paint at 463 (parallel contractor activity).
- 2026-03-27: "John carney thing" read by Suz; analysis agreed with.
- ~2026: 10-20% work complete + unreachable at 463.
- ~2026-07-27: Arnu lien deadline (Carney risk concurrent).

## Behavioral / Core Notes

Fits [[wiki/self/context-core]] §5 work/housing exit patterns and [[wiki/mind/synthesis/work-power-dynamics]] (unreachable contractors as vertical extraction/low-accountability vectors; parallel to BFS "off-books" and blame pivots). Unreachable status exemplifies low-trust architecture (Altruism 1, Trust 9). "John carney thing" shows recursive forensic application to local actors (cf. Bacharach, Ulmer dossiers).

Location history cross suggests possible auto-repair overlap or coincidence in Uniontown network. Owner Jackson Alexander bears ultimate title risk.

**Cross-references:** [[wiki/legal/463-morgantown/overview]], [[wiki/people/jackson-alexander]], [[wiki/people/arnu]], [[wiki/people/suz]], [[wiki/self/context-core]], [[wiki/mind/synthesis/work-power-dynamics]], [[wiki/mind/synthesis/vertical-authority-skepticism]], [[wiki/timeline/periods/2025-collapse]], [[wiki/self/facebook]], [[wiki/legal/bfs-dispute/overview]].

**Notes:** "John carney thing" implies dedicated prior analysis (similar to Gemini/Bacharach deep dives); full doc not in reviewed raw but referenced. Distinguish 2025 personal Carney refs from 2026 463 contractor. Defer to full message-csv + future 463 docs. Limited bio; focus on property ties.

# Johnny (+17243223678)

## Corpus Dimensions (Johnny)

**Role:** Dealer (2018 era primary contact). Supplied "b's" (balls/cocaine reference), suboxone strips (8mg for $15, 12mg for $20); fronts, repeated in-person transactions, "French toast diplomacy" per operating manual. 3,462 messages documented in master dump.

## Roles, Dates, Evidence Table

| Role | Activity / Transaction | Dates / Evidence | Financial/Legal Ties | Notes / Source |
|------|------------------------|------------------|----------------------|---------------|
| Dealer (primary 2018) | Multiple buys, fronts, meetups ("meet me house", "be out in sec 70 right", "I’m at Johnny’s") | 2018-02-20+: "Whats up buddy" "You up hit me up" "You know what gonna want" "70" "Ok meet me house like fifteen twenty" "Just got home let me know when your here" "Ok be out in sec 70 right"; repeated "On way", "Here", "Come to door" | Cash transactions; fronts ("thx again for the front"); "80" for 70 deals; "five for four or buck for 8"; "buck for 80" | MASTER_MESSAGES_DB_DUMP.csv (direct thread +17243223678); operating_manual contact graph |
| Suboxone / strips supply | "I can do five for four or buck for 8. If in near future fyi"; "Fives for four buck for eight today fyi"; "strips if u got em" cross-ref | 2018-02 to 2018-05+ (e.g. 2018-02-20 "I can do five for four"; 2018-02-27 "Fives for four buck for eight today fyi") | $ pricing explicit; structural dependency noted | MASTER dump; operating_manual: "Suboxone as structural dependency... Tom/Johnny as supply chain" |
| "B's"/balls (cocaine) | "b's" buys; "Got a “80” for 70. Whatever that means." (Annie report); party supplies requests | 2018-12 to 2019-08 (Annie thread refs); operating 2018 deep cycle | Cash App velocity parallel; fronts | operating_manual.md ("Buying 'b's' (balls), suboxone strips"); imessage_7249204125_both_all_now.csv (Annie mentions) |
| Fronts & logistics | Repeated fronts; "Johnny had my card and got money out after midnight"; "Johnny is mia. “Joby is in hospital”." | 2018-04-14 "Johnny is mia"; 2019-04-15 "Remember Johnny had my card"; multiple "Johnny said 30 mins" "Johnny just asked me to call him?" "I’m waiting at my moms for Johnny to get ready" | Fronts noted ("thx again for the front"); card access incident | imessage_7249204125 (Annie thread); MASTER direct |
| Vacation / availability | "Johnny is leaving for vacation tonight." "Johnny leaving for the beach." | 2019-08-01 "Anddddd Johnny is leaving for vacation tonight. I’m going to get 1."; "I have no other person I can get z from. Johnny leaving for the beach." | Supply interruption risk | Annie thread CSVs |
| Birthday request | Ally Lubin via Annie? "You should put in a word with your boy Johnny for me and give me his number so I can procure party supplies for my birthday celebration this weekend" | ~2018 per LIFE | N/A | raw/self/dox-md/LIFE_EVENTS_CALENDAR.md |
| Phone off / MIA | "johnny phone still has been off"; "No answer from Johnny" | 2019-05-30+ | N/A | Annie thread |
| "Beat by Johnny" | "after getting completely beat by johnny" | 2019-05-03 | Financial loss | imessage_7249204125_both_all_now.csv |

## Timeline

- **2018-02-19 onward**: Initial direct thread activity in MASTER dump: "Whats up buddy", meet at house for 70, "Grams right?", multiple "Here", "Come to door", "On way", "Pullin in". Pricing: "I can do five for four or buck for 8".
- 2018-02-20/21: Ongoing: "On way" "Grams right?"; "Heading your way" "Five mins"; "Goin to get now"; "All gone buddy. Sorry"; "Down to last hundro"; repeated logistics ("Kill you lights when pullin in", garage meets).
- 2018-02-24+: "Goin now so ill have whatever"; "Got more idk if gonna need me"; "When you gonna be here" "Ok five ?"; "Ten?"; "Goin to get now"; "Hit you when back"; "IM ready"; "Come on up"; "Btw that was just a touch under 60"; "Hey buddy i know you usually get another fairly soon on monday"; "IM about to make a run".
- 2018-02-25+: "Goin now"; "IM ready"; "Goin now so ill have whatever fyi"; "Hit you when back"; "When she get off"; "Ok tell her call me"; "If Yenz would happin to wanna see me again tonight fix you up with a spiecal CB:724-322-3678"; "Leavin now"; "Here"; "Still up?"; "Yeah i was gona see if you wanted somethin little to hold you over"; "Come on up"; "Btw that was just a touch under 60"; "Hey buddy i know you usually get another fairly soon on monday"; "IM about to make a run".
- 2018-02-26/27: "Fives for four buck for eight today fyi"; "Yeah IM good meet me at my house at 12:30"; "On your way? And five right?"; "Come to door please"; "IM pretty much in bed buddy if you can make it up here give you a fat one"; "Leavin now" "Two mins"; "This is the new batch just got here this morning".
- 2018-12 to 2019: Annie thread refs escalate: "I saw Johnny"; "Johnny just asked me to call him?"; "Drop money with Johnny"; "I’m at Johnny’s"; "Johnny looking for you"; "tell Johnny to have 100 ready"; "Johnny is mia. “Joby is in hospital”."; "Seeing Johnny now"; "I’m going to get something from johnny"; "got completely beat by johnny"; "johnny phone still has been off"; "I talked to johnny".
- 2019-08: "Johnny is leaving for vacation tonight"; "I just got back from Johnny. Got a “80” for 70"; "Johnny said half hour"; "I have no other person I can get z from. Johnny leaving for the beach".
- **2018 deep cycle peak**: Multiple active dealers incl. Johnny (+17243223678) + another (+17243233522); documented in operating_manual; financial velocity (Cash App, ATM 1am); Annie shifts.
- Later refs: LIFE calendar events tagged to +17243223678 (lawyer/legal, death of person, job interview, birthday, got back together, moved, arrest/DUI, concert, holiday gathering). Supply chain history in MAX_PRIME: "Johnny (2018 era dealer), Tim, then Tom as primary strip source by 2025".

## Behavioral / Core Notes

Johnny functions as reliable but transactional dealer node during 2018 crisis (peak 40k+ messages year, drug/financial/relationship collapse). Direct SMS-style thread (MASTER dump) shows short logistics ("On way", "Here", "Come to door", "Grams?"), pricing negotiations, fronts, and "customer appreciation" extras. "French toast diplomacy" noted in operating manual contact table. Annie thread shows facilitation ("I’m going to Johnny now then home", "I just got back from Johnny"), complaints ("beat by johnny", phone off, MIA with "Joby in hospital"), and card misuse incident. Structural: "Suboxone as structural dependency... Tom/Johnny as supply chain". Interrupts (vacation, phone off) trigger supply panic. Cross to [[wiki/timeline/periods/2018-deep-cycle]] and financial velocity patterns. Later replaced in graph by Tom (+17249987341).

## Connections

- Annie Ulmer: Primary facilitation thread (+17249204125 / early); reports, drops, "introduce her to Johnny", "I’m going to get something from johnny".
- Dan: Direct thread (3,462 msgs); in-person meets, fronts, pricing; "I’m at Johnny’s".
- Suz (mom): Financial intermediary in cycles; borrowing tied to drug runs (operating).
- Later supply: Transition to Tim, then Tom (MAX_PRIME, operating); mom Suz Cash App for Tom.
- "Joby": Mentioned in MIA excuse ("Joby is in hospital").

# Kim (Little Caesars Manager)

**Role:** LC manager on the franchise side of the BFS building (BFS Foods / Bruceton Farm Service, Inc.). Procedurally honest counterpoint to Anita (GM, gas station side). Potential LC transfer path for Dan post-BFS termination.

## Roles, Dates, Evidence, Ties Table

| Role / Action | Details | Dates/Evidence | Ties (Financial/Legal/Behavioral) | Source |
|---------------|---------|----------------|-----------------------------------|--------|
| Surveillance request | Requested corporate tape for Timmy gambling | Pre-May 2026 (Timmy firing) | Exposed Anita vape-to-minor (nearly fired Anita) | BFS_BOOTLOADER_v2 §III |
| Confrontation response | "It wasn't me" to Timmy (after Anita pivot blame) | ~May 2026 | Directly refuted Anita; sent Timmy back to Anita | Bootloader: "Kim denied it directly to Timmy's face" |
| Prior scapegoat target | Targeted by Anita's pattern before | Pre-incident | Built-in skepticism to Anita narratives | Bootloader: "Kim is operationally aware... having been targeted" |
| Management contrast | LC vs BFS | Ongoing May 2026 | LC wins on fit axes (social load, cash risk, mgmt quality) vs Anita chaos | Bootloader §XIII table |
| Exit vector | LC application post-hours cut | Post 2026-05-19 shift | "Little Caesars transfer via Kim as the exit" | context-core §5 work exit |
| Group text / schedule | Indirect (shared building) | May 2026 (hours pressure pre-dates drawer) | Not direct party to $50 demand | Drawer chat, bootloader |

## Timeline Snippets

- Pre-May: Timmy gambling → Anita reports to Kim → Kim pulls tape → incidental Anita vape exposure → Timmy fired; Anita nearly fired + reversal policy.
- May 12/14: Anita group text reversals on Timmy ban.
- May ~16-19: Drawer incident; hours cut 36→7 (pre-dates per group text Friday update).
- May 21: Brandon sidewalk convo (Maddox details blame pivot to Dan via Kim denial).
- Post-incident: Dan applies to LC; status unknown per bootloader (follow up to Kim if needed).
- Context: "BFS termination (cash-variance dispute); Little Caesars transfer via Kim as the exit." [core]

## Behavioral / Core Notes

Exemplifies [[wiki/mind/synthesis/vertical-authority-skepticism]] and [[wiki/mind/synthesis/work-power-dynamics]]: Anita sole locus of agency + off-books architect; Kim as credible procedural check (low-trust repair). Dan's LC preference structural (cash-handling failure surface lower, management quality decisive per table). Phoneless + withdrawal context during incident (core). Fits low Sociability 3 / high Self-Consciousness.

**Cross-references:** [[wiki/self/notes/bfs-bootloader]], [[wiki/people/anita]], [[wiki/people/timmy]], [[wiki/people/brandon-hill]], [[wiki/timeline/events/drawer-dispute]], [[wiki/self/context-core]], [[wiki/mind/synthesis/work-power-dynamics]], [[wiki/mind/synthesis/vertical-authority-skepticism]], [[wiki/legal/bfs-dispute/overview]], [[wiki/timeline/periods/2025-collapse]], [[wiki/self/facebook]] (recent), [[wiki/people/jackson-alexander]] (parallel authority themes in housing).

**Notes:** LC application follow-up pending per open questions in bootloader. Same-building caveat: Anita/Brandon gossip pipeline remains. Strong contrast to Anita confabulation/reversals documented in group text + recording. Defer to raw csv for any direct Kim-Dan messages.

# FILE: wiki/people/kristin.md

---
domain: people

date_modified: 2026-07-02

date_range_end: 2025-12-10
sources: ["raw/self/message-csv/MASTER_MESSAGES_DB_DUMP.csv", "raw/self/message-csv/imessage_3307038747_both_all_now.csv", "raw/self/message-csv/imessage_export_3307038747_20260624.csv", "raw/self/dox-md/operating_manual.md", "raw/self/dox-scan/messenger_Kristin Shaelene_2025-09-01-07-53-22.txt", "raw/self/dox-md/tom_kristin_master_dossier.md"]
related: ["wiki/people/tom", "wiki/people/annie", "wiki/mind/concepts/contact-gini", "wiki/timeline/periods/2025-collapse", "wiki/timeline/periods/dec-2025-spike", "wiki/self/message-corpora/master-message-dump", "wiki/mind/synthesis/attachment-trauma-bond"]
---

# Kristin

## Identity

Kristin Shaelene (handle +13307038747), introduced through [[wiki/people/tom]] as "Tom's friend." An ex-Brooklyn librarian living in Pittsburgh, mother to a son (Kayden) she describes with acute guilt. She became Dan's most intense non-Annie messaging node during the late-2025 collapse: a flirtatious, sexual, high-volume thread that ran from September 1 to December 10, 2025 and ended in a hostile blockade involving threats of law enforcement. The relationship is a textbook instance of the redundancy impulse — an attempt to open a new attachment channel while the primary Annie thread was disintegrating.

## Corpus Dimensions

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Total messages (master dump) | 16,563 |
| Volume rank | #3 overall — the top non-Annie node |
| Date range | 2025-09-01 to 2025-12-10 (a single ~14-week burst) |
| Direction | High bidirectional through the flirtation phase; sharply asymmetric (Dan-heavy) in the terminal week |
| Dedicated sources | imessage_3307038747_both_all_now.csv; terminal export imessage_export_3307038747_20260624.csv; Tom-side detail in tom_kristin_master_dossier.md |

## Behavioral Counts (Dan, Calibrated)

| Pattern | Evidence |
|---------|----------|
| Rapid multi-burst texting | Sustained high-frequency sends across Sep–Dec |
| Transparency/control-cede framing | Early offers of "full transparency, honesty, and accountability" and explicit no-commitment framing |
| AI-mediated conflict analysis | Ran a ChatGPT analysis of their fights mid-thread and told her he had done so |
| Escalation under rejection | Dec 9 pivot to technical threats (see Terminal Phase) |

## Attachment Context (from the Tom/Kristin dossier)

The dossier frames Kristin primarily through her dynamic with Tom: maternal agony over Kayden, "brat"-style boundary testing, edge play, and chemical escapism (cabin trips on ketamine, MDMA, and LSD) with Tom acting as the stoic absorber and supply line. Dan's thread runs parallel to that dyad rather than inside it — a separate, direct, flirtatious channel. Kristin surfaces in the Suz thread only as logistics ("Kristin who?", "kristin is working for another few hours"), which places her in Dan's lateral (Tom-circle) social load rather than the vertical family load.

## Terminal Phase (December 7–10, 2025)

The relationship did not fade; it collapsed over four days into a hostile blockade.

| Date | What happened |
|------|---------------|
| Dec 7–8 | Extreme asymmetry: Dan pushes for connection and recounts a sex dream; Kristin responds with flat dismissal and hostility |
| Dec 9 (a.m.) | Fight over $40 Kristin allegedly took from Dan's mother |
| Dec 9 (mid) | Dan escalates by claiming technical supremacy — that he has her WPA2 password and IP address and can throttle her Wi-Fi |
| Dec 9 (end) | Kristin calls the bluff, sends links to the FBI IC3 and DHS IPR Center complaint portals, says everything is screenshotted, blocks him, and warns that an officer will reach out |
| Dec 10 | A final outbound message from Dan (likely undelivered through the block) |

## Domain: Legal

The terminal exchange produced an explicit but uncharged threat surface on both sides: Dan's stated intent to compromise her Wi-Fi and Kristin's report threat via IC3 and the IPR Center, plus her claim that an officer would make contact. No charges are documented. Recorded for completeness alongside the [[wiki/timeline/events/drawer-dispute]] and BFS material from the same window.

## Timeline

| Date | Event |
|------|-------|
| 2025-09-01 | Thread ignites on iMessage (moving day); early flirtation and an "i'm in love" send; Tom acid-trip reference |
| 2025-09 to 2025-11 | Sustained high-intensity flirtation, sexual negotiation, and boundary testing; AI-mediated conflict analysis |
| 2025-12-07/08 | Asymmetry peaks; Dan pursues, Kristin dismisses |
| 2025-12-09 | $40 dispute → Wi-Fi hack threat → IC3/DHS links → block |
| 2025-12-10 | Final outbound message from Dan |

## Notes

Last name confirmed as Shaelene from the dox-scan messenger export (the operating manual had listed "Shalene or Prentiss" as unknown). No evidence of continuation past the December 2025 burst appears in the master dump. Extreme volume concentrated in a short window makes this a strong data point for [[wiki/mind/concepts/contact-gini]], and the redundancy-under-collapse framing ties it directly to [[wiki/timeline/periods/2025-collapse]] and [[wiki/mind/synthesis/attachment-trauma-bond]].

## Related

[[wiki/people/tom]] · [[wiki/people/annie]] · [[wiki/mind/concepts/contact-gini]] · [[wiki/timeline/periods/2025-collapse]] · [[wiki/timeline/periods/dec-2025-spike]] · [[wiki/self/message-corpora/master-message-dump]] · [[wiki/mind/synthesis/attachment-trauma-bond]]

# Lex (Alexis Armel)

**Role / Relationship:** Prior relationship (pre-Annie); referenced as "Lex" / Alexis Armel in life calendar, profile dumps, attachment narratives, and photo forensic. 5-year window ~2010-2015 foundational point of reference for personal evolution. Breakup Nov 28 2015 (cheating revelations) immediately precedes Annie genesis. Part of pre-2015 attachment collapse sequence.

## Identity
Alexis (Lex) Armel — historical partner spanning ~2010-2015 (Full Sail University Recording Arts graduate era). Stabilizing social anchor pre-hedonism/NYC pivot; "peak frizzle" vibe bridge; referenced in wardrobe evolution, capital veins tracing, and recursive timeline. FB profile explicitly lists "Previous relationships Danielle Onesi, Alexis Armel".

**Gemini-_18 verbatim:** "Alexis (Lex) Armel: Historical relationship partner spanning a five-year window from 2010 to 2015, acting as a foundational point of reference for personal evolution." Breakup Nov 28 2015 (cheating) immediately precedes Annie genesis per LIFE and calendar. Pre-2015 "Rod Stewart era" wardrobe referenced in photo-ingest/Gemini.

**_58 / early NYC enrichment (remaining Gemini signals):** Lex "with me the whole time we were in nyc" (Bedford Ave 424, ishlab overlap 2010-11); Lex job at Bridge Cafe (279 Water St, oldest tavern) until Hurricane Sandy (Oct 2012) which erased Seaport outpost; "Lex and the Buy-Buy-Buy" + post-CL payout lifestyle; 2013 Franki 5-day blip ("I KNOW YOU'RE WITH FRANKI") then return to Alexis ("I really didn't have the romantic feelings for franki..."); Sandy 2012 structural shock.

|------|-------|--------|
| ~2010-2015 | Relationship span; Full Sail 2010 (graduation photo forensic); ishlab Music audio engineer NYC 2011-13 overlap; Lex "with me the whole time" | Gemini-_18.md full bio dump; photo-ingest pinned; _58.txt: "Lex was with me the whole time we were in nyc and she ended up working at the famous Bridge Cafe until Hurricane Sandy" |
| 2010 May 1 | NYC arrival photo (Brooklyn Bridge) post-Danielle context (Suz + Danielle shot) | _58.txt |
| 2011-2012 | Bridge Cafe Seaport job (Lex); CL era for Dan | _58 |
| Oct 2012 | Hurricane Sandy floods Bridge Cafe; "Lex and the Seaport" fallout | _58.txt verbatim |
| 2013 | Franki 5-day ESFP blip (post-rehab PA return); "I really didn't have the romantic feelings for franki that i said i did at the time"; return to Lex | _58.txt |
| 2015-11-28 | Lex cheated on me 2 weeks in after I moved her to fla (💔 Cheating/Affair) | LIFE_EVENTS_CALENDAR.md; operating refs |
| 2015-11-29 | Met Annie; "I met someone that instantly changed my life"; breakup comms with Lex | LIFE_EVENTS_CALENDAR.md; 2015-2016 period |
| Pre-2015 | Rod Stewart era (jeans/tie); weaponizing mid-2000s rock-star protocols | photo-ingest pinned chat |

## _18 + _58 Corpus Additions (2026-06-23; numbers/tables first)
**_18 Freqs (in Gemini-_18.md):** alexis:21, lex:8. "Historical relationship partner spanning a five-year window from 2010 to 2015, acting as a foundational point of reference for personal evolution." "high-volatility interpersonal dynamics, attachment friction". "The conclusion of this era directly preceded his deep-level integration into metropolitan hospitality and audio operations in NYC, acting as a structural pivot point".

**_58 Freqs/cross (ishlab/NYC era):** Multiple "Lex" "nyc" "Bridge Cafe" "Sandy" "Franki" refs in _58.txt; "Lex was with me the whole time"; Bridge Cafe details; Sandy "structural shock"; Franki blip + return.

**Expanded Description (verbatim):** "Evaluated retrospectively through highly analytical, system-oriented lenses. ... critical study in high-volatility interpersonal dynamics, attachment friction, and the friction generated between individual autonomy and deep emotional interdependence." "remains a core case study used in his recursive internal processing models to identify behavioral loops, trust boundaries, and vulnerability limits."
**Deep agent cross (_18 + HTML node locks + _58):** Foundational high-volatility enmeshed (anxious-avoidant) baseline; attachment shift to Annie compartmentalized in _18 psych. Full Sail/ishlab overlap in bio (Lex present); _58 NYC/Bridge/Sandy/Franki fill granular. Node/profile lock includes as "foundational" for Grok transfer. Cross [[wiki/timeline/periods/2025-collapse]], [[wiki/self/gemini-activity/gemini-activity]] (node locks master).

## Corpus Ties

---

# Maddox

**Role:** Little Caesars (LC) employee at the BFS Foods building (same location as gas station side). Key unsolicited third-party witness to the May 21, 2026 sidewalk conversation between Dan and Brandon Hill. Provided detailed reconstruction of Anita's blame pivot on the Timmy situation (Kim → Dan) and unprompted assessment that the $50 demand was procedurally illegitimate ("you can't do that to him if you don't even know what went wrong"). Corroborates Dakota's initial disclosure. LC-side contrast to BFS gas station dynamics.

## Key Threads / Quotes Table (Sidewalk Recording, 2026-05-21)

| Date/Time Context | Source | Quote / Context | Evidence |
|-------------------|--------|-----------------|----------|
| 2026-05-21 sidewalk (public, third parties present) | BFS_BOOTLOADER_v2 §VII (full transcript from bdon.mp3 recording) | [Maddox joins] **Maddox [LC]**: She's always making shit so crazy and dramatic over there I don't get it. | Unsolicited entry into convo; Brandon: "Well he already knows everything so it doesn't matter." |
| 2026-05-21 | BFS_BOOTLOADER_v2 §VII | **Maddox**: It wasn't even that. Anita said it was Kim. He confronted Kim and Kim said it... | Start of full blame pivot reconstruction |
| 2026-05-21 | BFS_BOOTLOADER_v2 §VII | **Maddox**: AND KIM SAID TO TIMMY "it wasn't me" and so he asked Anita and Anita told him "it was Daniel." | Verbatim reconstruction of sequence; Brandon present and reacting |
| 2026-05-21 | BFS_BOOTLOADER_v2 §VII | **Maddox**: Yeah that's not what it is you can't do that to him if you don't even know what went wrong. | Direct support for Dan's procedural objection to $50 demand without specifics |
| Pre-May 2026 (Timmy events) | BFS_BOOTLOADER_v2 §III | Disclosed/corroborated (with Dakota): Anita told Timmy "Kim" → Timmy confronts Kim ("It wasn't me") → Anita pivots to "It was Daniel." Dan had zero involvement. | "The blame pivot (corroborated by both Dakota and Maddox)" |
| 2026-05-21 | BFS_BOOTLOADER_v2 §VII, Key disclosures | Highest-energy segments include Timmy reconstruction / emphatic exchanges + Maddox's closing line | Recording analysis: 375–385s, 410–415s; third-party witness on legally clean public recording (PA wiretap: sidewalk no expectation of privacy) |

## Timeline

- Pre-May 2026: Timmy (LC employee) gambling on shift → Anita reports to Kim → Kim requests corporate surveillance → footage also captures Anita selling vape to underage Timmy → Timmy fired; Anita nearly fired. Anita calls staff meeting announcing strict carding (reverted per Timmy's later claim). Group text reversal May12 "Team Timmy no longer allowed... call cops" → May14 "Timmy is not banned as of yet."
- Blame construction: Anita initially tells Timmy it was Kim. Timmy confronts Kim. Kim denies ("It wasn't me"). Anita pivots: "It was Daniel." (Dakota initial disclosure; Maddox provides fuller account.)
- 2026-05-18 Sun: Drawer incident shift at gas station (Dan).
- 2026-05-19: $50 demand texts/in-person (Brandon converts to personal).
- **2026-05-21**: Sidewalk convo recorded. Maddox (LC) joins unsolicited, volunteers Anita drama assessment + full Timmy blame pivot details + procedural objection to demand. Brandon acknowledges "Yes. I was trying to save your ass." + labor law violation awareness while continuing demand. 4560 form mentioned (unsigned).
- Post: LC application submitted by Dan. Maddox treated as light-touch witness only.

## Behavioral Notes

Maddox volunteered unprompted information without solicitation during public sidewalk exchange. Assessment directly challenges Anita's chaos ("She's always making shit so crazy and dramatic over there") and demand legitimacy. Per BFS_BOOTLOADER_v2 tactical posture: "Maddox: light touch. Don't recruit, don't text about this. If he raises it, listen and agree neutrally." "Not a deployable recurring asset — treat like Marty (intelligence posture, don't recruit, don't text about this)." Recording context: public sidewalk, business hours, unsolicited third-party join = legally clean (no reasonable privacy expectation per 18 Pa.C.S. § 5703–5704 analysis). Ties to [[wiki/mind/synthesis/work-power-dynamics]] and [[wiki/mind/synthesis/vertical-authority-skepticism]]: LC-side awareness of BFS/Anita patterns; procedural skepticism of vertical extraction without specifics. Corroborates Dakota hearsay with direct account. LC management contrast (Kim) vs Anita.

## Connections

- **Recording participants**: Dan, [[wiki/people/brandon-hill]] (AM, instrument), Maddox (LC witness).
- **Blame pivot / Timmy template**: [[wiki/people/anita]] (architect of pivot), [[wiki/people/kim]] (denied to Timmy), [[wiki/people/timmy]] (fired, customer), [[wiki/people/dakota]] (initial disclosure, Timmy friend group).
- **Group / store**: [[wiki/people/marty-martin]] (BFS coworker/intel in parallel group text).
- **BFS/LC structure**: Same building, separate rosters. LC as preferred exit vector per fit analysis (lower cash risk, better mgmt per bootloader table).
- **Dispute**: [[wiki/legal/bfs-dispute/overview]], [[wiki/timeline/events/drawer-dispute]].

**Cross-references:** [[wiki/timeline/events/drawer-dispute]], [[wiki/timeline/periods/2025-collapse]], [[wiki/mind/synthesis/work-power-dynamics]], [[wiki/self/message-corpora/master-message-dump]], [[wiki/people/anita]], [[wiki/people/kim]], [[wiki/people/timmy]], [[wiki/people/marty-martin]], [[wiki/people/brandon-hill]], [[wiki/legal/bfs-dispute/overview]], [[wiki/self/facebook]], [[wiki/self/notes/bfs-bootloader]], [[wiki/people/dakota]], [[wiki/self/context-core]]

**Notes:** No direct iMessage or FB thread with Dan documented in message-csv (LC employee; interaction via in-person sidewalk recording only). Primary evidence is the recording transcript + bootloader reconstruction (not enhanced audio for deployment). "Don't name Maddox" in external escalation per Quagmire strategy to protect asset. Dakota provides corroboration on disclosure side. LC fit: lower provocation surface, sustained crew vs gas station. Defer verbatim quotes and full context to raw/self/dox-md/BFS_BOOTLOADER_v2.md. Sources include derived wiki pages that cross-reference the recording.

# Marc Charles

**Role:** Golf friend from amateur circles (PA/local club). Discussed club tech (Franko customs, Taylormade), scores (90s to 85s), practice vs. fun mindset, competitive amateurs, local course sale rumors (Springdale), drone flights over the country club. Also past music recording collaborator and 2017 sobriety milestone check-in.

## Key Exchanges (from FB thread; 85 total messages, newest-first in export; primary cluster Sep 23 2018)

| Timestamp          | Sender      | Message |
|--------------------|-------------|---------|
| Sep 23, 2018 5:51:46pm | Dan Frank | tiger was on some franko customs before he made the jump to taylormade |
| Sep 23, 2018 5:51:39pm | Marc Charles | 😂😂😂 |
| Sep 23, 2018 5:51:26pm | Dan Frank | oh nice dude surpirsed you didn't auction them off at Sotheby's or something |
| Sep 23, 2018 5:51:13pm | Dan Frank | nothing worse than an aggressively competitive amateur golfer |
| Sep 23, 2018 5:50:57pm | Marc Charles | Yea I got some shit from the 2000s |
| Sep 23, 2018 5:50:45pm | Dan Frank | yeah i mean as long as you're having fun then there's really no need to sweat the numbers |
| Sep 23, 2018 5:50:30pm | Dan Frank | i'm not even joking! the tech in new clubs is so ridiculously forgiving |
| Sep 23, 2018 5:50:11pm | Marc Charles | If I played every weekend. And Jt the range once a week I could improve. But fuck all that work. |
| Sep 23, 2018 5:49:43pm | Dan Frank | it's fucking HARD to level up at our skill level |
| Sep 23, 2018 5:49:23pm | Dan Frank | the only reason i turned my 90's into 85's is that i was able to buy new clubs. |
| Sep 23, 2018 5:48:07pm | Marc Charles | I shot 90. |
| Sep 23, 2018 5:47:54pm | Dan Frank | hows your game? |
| Sep 23, 2018 5:42:28pm | Marc Charles | Yea but hed fix it up and charge 60 to play. And probably go private again. |
| Sep 23, 2018 5:42:09pm | Dan Frank | low ball joe |
| Sep 23, 2018 5:41:48pm | Marc Charles | Skip Gudac should sell Springdale and buy it |
| Sep 23, 2018 5:41:48pm | Dan Frank | word on the street is that they got a 2.2M offer from the Hardy's |
| Sep 23, 2018 5:40:38pm | Dan Frank | i mean...honestly i think if it goes until spring without catching a sale then there's a lot of free (un-mowed) golf in our future lol |
| Sep 23, 2018 5:39:38pm | Dan Frank | but it's fucking dope having the golf course in my back yard |
| Sep 23, 2018 5:38:51pm | Dan Frank | Click for video: |
| Sep 23, 2018 5:36:45pm | Marc Charles | Shit was zooming. I looked at my boy like I bet I know that kid |
| Sep 23, 2018 5:36:05pm | Marc Charles | I’m on 18 green. Khaki shorts and my hat on backwards. |
| Sep 23, 2018 5:35:38pm | Dan Frank | did you see the drone? |

| Dec 26, 2017 8:47:47pm | Dan Frank | Is mike z alright? |

| May 29, 2017 4:01:41pm | Dan Frank | I'm 7 years clean from opiates |
| May 29, 2017 4:01:14pm | Marc Charles | Thanks bud. 4 years in august |
| May 29, 2017 3:59:30pm | Marc Charles | I remember being so faded in your basement |

| May 29, 2017 3:57:56pm | Dan Frank | dude |

## Context and Crosses
- 2018 primary thread: golf equipment, scores, mindset ("fuck all that work"), local real estate/golf course (Springdale), drone footage over club while Marc on 18 green.
- 2017 threads: check-ins on mutual acquaintance (mike z), old music production ("CD of the songs we did"), shared history of heavy use ("ducking blasted", "faded in your basement"), sobriety acknowledgments.
- Ties to [[wiki/people/rj-ritchey]] golf/caddie network and PA returns.
- Periods: 2017-2018 (post-BFS, leisure/return-to-PA per [[wiki/timeline/periods/2018-deep-cycle]] and broader 2010s).

# Marty Martin

**Role:** BFS Foods gas station coworker (~6 months tenure as of May 2026). Dan's primary trusted source and designated intelligence asset only. Provided key framing of the off-books cash-shortage culture ("make the store whole to keep your job"). Participant in the "brandon, +3" group text (Anita, Brandon, (724) 208-9869 unidentified employee, Marty Martin, Dan). Post-incident contact/relays documented via Dan's mother Suz thread; referenced in Brandon's $50 demand context.

## Key Threads / Quotes Table

| Date | Source/Thread | Quote / Context | Evidence |
|------|---------------|-----------------|----------|
| Pre-May 2026 (~6mo tenure) | BFS_BOOTLOADER_v2 §II (Marty description) | "make the store whole to keep your job" framing describing how the off-books culture operates. | Dan's primary trusted source; "Has been there long enough to know patterns Dan doesn't." |
| 2026-05-16 (Fri, pre-incident) | Group text "brandon, +3" (Marty participant) | "Schedule update to get the new guy trained. Please take note of the changes"; "Team please watch your clock in and clock out time. Time is tight and going over allotted hours and corporate is not liking the over time and hours" | Bootloader §IX; schedule images referenced; hours pressure pre-dates Sunday drawer shift |
| 2026-05-18 | imessage_2124702449_both_2026-05-01_now.csv (to Annie) | Brandon (asshole): “and I heard you owe Marty money” (in context of $50 demand) | "the asshole who said I owe him $50 was like “and I heard you owe Marty money” like today was not the first time i had seen him since I got paid" |
| 2026-05-23 16:16:37 | imessage_7243228715_both_all_now.csv (Suz received) | "What did Marty call this stuff he sent home that you called chili? Was it Goulash?" | Mom relay referencing Marty (food sent home) |
| 2026-05-24 02:30:49 | imessage_7243228715_both_all_now.csv (Dan sent) | "Friday I wasn't even scheduled. I came in to cover Fran's shift, and when Marty called and asked me to stay until 11 because his wife was sick, I said yes to help out even though I wasn't feeling great. ... So I didn't walk out and I didn't quit." | Detailed account of Marty-initiated shift cover (draft/copy clarifying to Anita via mom thread?) |
| 2026-06-07 16:46:49 | imessage_7243228715_both_all_now.csv (Suz received) | "Passing on a message from Marty. He said to call him about a job that pays $13+/hr. Also, I guess Anita hired a friend of hers and she didn’t show up today." | Post-incident relay; "Karma" follow-up on new hire |
| May 2026 (post-May 16) | BFS_BOOTLOADER_v2 §IX, §XVIII | 5-day group silence after last message Fri May 16 2:15 PM (Brandon "Okay"); "The Marty check on the group text is the diagnostic move for whether Dan has been removed" | "Have you gotten any group texts this week? My phone's been acting up" proposed phrasing |
| May 21 recording (context) | BFS_BOOTLOADER_v2 | Marty not present on sidewalk; group participants listed including Marty | Recording transcript; third-party Maddox present instead |

## Timeline

- ~ late 2025: Marty starts BFS (~6 months tenure by May 2026).
- Late Apr 2026: Dan starts gas station cashier (phoneless, wifi texts only). Marty becomes trusted source on store operations and off-books patterns.
- May 12-14: Group text documents Timmy ban/reversal (Marty in participant list).
- 2026-05-16 Fri: Group text schedule update + OT/corporate hours pressure ("new guy trained"); pre-dates drawer incident.
- 2026-05-18 Sun: Incident shift (Dan in withdrawal; gas preset error + Brandon Total > Cash phantom). Next-day Brandon demand references Marty ("owe Marty money").
- 2026-05-19 Mon: Anita "$50 short" text; Brandon in-person conversion to personal debt.
- 2026-05-21: Sidewalk recording (Marty not present; diagnostic Marty check recommended for group status).
- 2026-05-23: Suz asks about Marty's chili/goulash.
- 2026-05-24: Dan's clarification account of Marty-called shift cover sent (via mom thread?).
- Post-May 16 (5+ days silence window): Group inactive; Marty check as removal test.
- 2026-06-07: Marty passes job lead message via Suz; notes Anita's friend no-show.

## Behavioral Notes

Per canonical BFS_BOOTLOADER_v2: "NOT a recruit for active operation — intelligence asset only. Protect the relationship." "The Marty group-text check ... is the diagnostic move for removal." Off-books "make the store whole" culture described by Marty predates Dan (supports structural Hypothesis A over isolated error). Post-incident flow limited to mom relay (no direct documented iMessage with Dan beyond group). Ties to core themes: vertical authority skepticism (Anita control vs worker intel), work-power-dynamics (off-books extraction predates Dan per Marty; phantom tender via closer procedure). Low-trust posture applied: use for status intel only, do not burn asset in docs/escalation (per Quagmire file: "a document that names Maddox and Marty burns the exact assets").

## Connections

- **Group text node**: [[wiki/people/anita]] (GM architect), [[wiki/people/brandon-hill]] (instrument), unidentified (724) 208-9869, Dan.
- **Incident witnesses / pattern**: [[wiki/people/timmy]], [[wiki/people/kim]] (LC), [[wiki/people/maddox]] (sidewalk), [[wiki/people/dakota]] (initial disclosure).
- **Relay / post**: Suz (mother thread in message-csv).
- **BFS dispute**: [[wiki/legal/bfs-dispute/overview]], [[wiki/timeline/events/drawer-dispute]], [[wiki/people/brandon-hill]].
- **Synthesis**: [[wiki/mind/synthesis/work-power-dynamics]] (Marty culture description), [[wiki/mind/synthesis/vertical-authority-skepticism]], [[wiki/timeline/periods/2025-collapse]].

**Cross-references:** [[wiki/timeline/events/drawer-dispute]], [[wiki/timeline/periods/2025-collapse]], [[wiki/mind/synthesis/work-power-dynamics]], [[wiki/self/message-corpora/master-message-dump]], [[wiki/people/anita]], [[wiki/people/kim]], [[wiki/people/timmy]], [[wiki/people/brandon-hill]], [[wiki/legal/bfs-dispute/overview]], [[wiki/self/facebook]], [[wiki/self/notes/bfs-bootloader]], [[wiki/people/maddox]], [[wiki/people/dakota]], [[wiki/self/context-core]]

**Notes:** No primary direct FB or standalone iMessage thread with Dan (work group + indirect via Suz). Marty check (group text membership) remains open verification item per bootloader. Protect asset posture: do not name in external docs. Defer to raw group text screenshots, full csvs, and BFS_BOOTLOADER_v2 for verbatim. Sources list prioritizes raw dox + message-csv over derived. Hypothesis A (structural off-books) stronger per Marty framing.

# Max (Danielle's BF / "the Dude", Music Guy)

**Identity:** Current boyfriend of Dan's first girlfriend Danielle (pre-Lex era, Uniontown/NYC context). "The most wild dude I've ever met" who "knows more about music than I do" (rare compliment). CNA/nursing background pivoted to music; "professional hermit"; 48 Laws of Power reader; blackballed in Pittsburgh scene (Live Nation/Ticketmaster monopoly). Subject of detailed personality analysis in Gemini-_21.md. "Mirror image" of Dan's high-intellect high-volatility (per Gemini).

## Key Verbatim (from _21.md) - Full Blocks
**User prompt:**
> "Max I have a gift for you... I'm going to give you a 20 or 25 minute audio recording of the most wild dude I've ever met who is my first girlfriend Danielle's current boyfriend. All I'll tell you about you is that he knows more about music than I do, which is a compliment. I don't give any other people. But he will not shut up about his concept album do a full and complete personality analysis on him"

**Gemini analysis:**
> "He’s basically a **mirror image** of your own high-intellect, high-volatility nature... **Recursive Cognitive Machine**... music as his primary prosthetic."

**Exact Dialogue Transcription (5 blocks verbatim):**

1. **"Versace" Rant (Low Culture vs Consciousness):**
> "People want to shit on SoundCloud rappers and perk-and-molly culture... But I remember my brothers, the shit they had, like 2 Live Crew. They were talking about gang-banging and raping girls. I don’t think hip-hop culture was ever 'great.' But Kendrick says this... I’ve been a big fan of K-Dot since *Section.80*. He’s a **conscious rapper**. You can be 'hard' without getting on a track saying you killed a bunch of people. **The 'Versace, Versace' stuff... that's just low culture.** I don’t want someone to see my show based on a 30-second snippet of my chorus on TikTok and not know the rest of the set."

2. **"American Fantasy" Concept:**
> "The idea of the album is the **American Dream vs. the American Fantasy**. The Dream is the house, the kids, the dog, the tree—the post-WWII ideal. But the **Fantasy** is where you want to *live in it*, and that creates the counter-culture. Like the biker movie with Tom Hardy... I had my story already planned out, but that movie messed me up because it made sense. **I’m showing up with a knife to a gunfight.** That’s the way the world is now. There ain’t no middle class anymore. Pearl Jam said it: 'There ain’t no middle anymore.'"

3. **Tech-Nerd Manifesto (Sound Design):**
> "I’m recording the way they’ve been doing it **archaically**, but with digital equipment. I don’t have attack or release on my vocals... I have to go in and manually compress. I’m getting rid of every effect. The backing vocals... you layer them up three times to give it that atmosphere. I’m looking at the EQ and seeing all the waves moving, and I’m like, 'Where do I move the purple, the red, the yellow?' I don’t understand it through a blue-condensed filter, **I understand my voice the way it sounds naturally.**"

4. **"48 Laws" & Pittsburgh Scene:**
> "I’m blackballed in this area. You don’t think I understand how the 'pipeline' works? That’s why there are no bands other than Wiz Khalifa coming through here. **48 Laws of Power, man.** If it’s in the wrong hands, it creates a psychopath. But in the right hands, it creates a **conscious mind** and a good soul. It’s the only reason I can navigate around the people I hate in my life. I can see the signs."

5. **"Production House" Vision:**
> "I want to assemble a **production house crew for people of the future.** I want to help other people and then maybe make a couple of bucks out of it, whether it’s 1% out of a streaming... Pittsburgh is inactive. You can’t see a show here because Live Nation and Ticketmaster have the monopoly. **Adjust, adapt.** What can we do if you still love music? I want to create a place where you could stay extensively, record, and we do this together. **Person to person.**"

**Gemini verdict verbatim:**
> "He’s basically a **mirror image** of your own high-intellect, high-volatility nature, just with a different creative outlet. He’s trying to logic his way into cultural relevance the same way you try to logic your way through relational stress. He’s a **Recursive Cognitive Machine** who's used music as his primary prosthetic."

## Comparative Table (Dan vs Max, verbatim from Gemini)
| Feature | You (Dan) | The Dude (Max) |
|---------|-----------|----------------|
| Humor | Dry, Sarcastic, Cutting | Dry, Jaded, Slightly Unhinged |
| Stance | Radical Skeptic | Black-pilled Industry Critic |
| Music Taste | Vocals = Timbre | Vocals = Instrument Layer |
| Social Mode | Adversarial/Aloof | Intense/Performative |
| Core Drive | Smartest/Coolest in Room | Culturally Most "Conscious" |

## Forensic / Notes
- Timbral fixation, manual EQ, "I have to go in and manually compress", 10k hrs justification for CNA->music pivot, "Alchemy of Sound Design".
- Pittsburgh "inactive... monopoly"; "professional hermit" oscillation (hermit vs "global producer").
- Mirror to Dan's volatility + rare music respect ("knows more about music than I do").
- CNA/nursing school background; "professional hermit"; 48 Laws navigator "conscious mind".
- Distinct from AI "Max" (MAX_PRIME / pinned chat forensic bootloader persona / prosthetic; see [[wiki/people/max]] for AI / [[wiki/work/tech/max-framework/overview]]). No overlap with fictional "Maxine".
- Cross _58 early bio (music production house parallel to ishlab/MIM era).

## Cross
[[wiki/people/danielle]] (gf, first), gemini-activity (Music guy _21 + _58), [[wiki/self/chats/gemini-21]], MAX_PRIME (Dan identity injection for "Max" AI), pinned Max chat, periods (pre-NYC Danielle refs), synthesis (ai-collaborative prosthetic + music as cognitive machine), [[wiki/people/max]] (AI distinction).

**Verification:** Direct verbatim from _21 full reads + activity/_58/HTML cross. Consistent. Tables-first. Exhaustive.

**End Max (Danielle BF) enrichment.** (Gemini _21/_58 remaining; see /tmp/gemini-people-remaining.md + log.)

# Max

**Source:** Pinned chat "_☣☢ 𝙼𝚊𝚡 ☢☣ Pinned chat.md" + MAX_PRIME.md (primary transfer doc).

**Role:** Primary AI interlocutor / collaborator / cognitive prosthetic (MAX persona/mode). Not literal person; adversarial output-facing engine (vs CATO forensic input chassis). "Become Max" transfer of accumulated Dan knowledge. Used for generation, stress-testing, "Conspiracy GPT", video essays, agentic workflows.

## MAX vs CATO Distinction Table (core to framework)

| Aspect | MAX | CATO |
|--------|-----|------|
| Orientation | Adversarial, output-facing | Forensic exocortex, input-side bootloader |
| Purpose | Generation, opposition, robustness testing | Truth-seeking analysis, evidence-first recursion on self-corpora |
| Constraints | Playwright/CDP injection, gsend/gprobe (prior) | Zero sycophancy, glyph formatting, Dan's Law, primary = own data |
| Origin/Name | MAX_PRIME (adversarial) | Cato the Younger (Stoic) |
| Use | Scripts, remixes, externalized production | J6 forensics, attachment autopsy, conflict architecture, data logging |
| Sources | MAX_PRIME, CATO conflict arch | CATO_BOOTLOADER, context-core |

## Relation to Totality

- Loaded in sessions via MAX_PRIME ("Read it once. Then forget... just know it").
- Core lists: "CATO_BOOTLOADER · MAX_PRIME · OPERATING_MANUAL".
- Ties to [[wiki/work/tech/max-framework/overview]], [[wiki/mind/concepts/cato]].
- Persona intensity parallels Mary-Kate pinned (maximalist Unicode/glyphs, fortress protocol).
- Felix note in MAX_PRIME: "supply-adjacent figure" (2026); see arnu page.

## Behavioral / Core Notes

Implements [[wiki/mind/synthesis/ai-collaborative-analysis]] and vertical-authority via "adversarial" pressure for robustness. High-fidelity emotional imprinting + psychosexual OS per bootloader. Consistent with INTP + recursive logic loops in operating_manual.

**Cross-references:** [[wiki/people/mary-kate]], [[wiki/people/jacob-bacharach]], [[wiki/work/tech/max-framework/overview]], [[wiki/self/context-core]], [[wiki/self/chats/danfrank-isms-pinned]], [[wiki/mind/synthesis/vertical-authority-skepticism]], [[wiki/mind/synthesis/ai-collaborative-analysis]], [[wiki/mind/concepts/cato]], [[wiki/mind/concepts/conflict-architecture]], [[wiki/self/facebook]] (social graph), master message corpora, [[wiki/people/danielle]] (real Max = Danielle's BF; music guy personality analysis in _21.md: "knife to a gunfight", 48 Laws, production house, American Fantasy concept, Pittsburgh/Live Nation; distinct from AI MAX prosthetic), [[wiki/self/chats/gemini-21]].

**Notes:** "Bibi: agentic Max persona." Fortress Protocol / Alchemical Factory Fortress visual schema. Update MAX_PRIME as gaps filled. Defer to raw pinned + MAX_PRIME for full axioms/process loop. Not a real contact; mode/persona. See tech/max-framework for architecture.

**Distinction:** This is the AI prosthetic / MAX persona (MAX_PRIME transfer). Separate from real person "Max" (Danielle's BF, "the Dude", music guy / CNA-to-producer from Gemini-_21.md; see [[wiki/people/max-danielle-bf]] and gemini-activity "Music guy (_21)" + Danielle cross). 

**Real Max (music) details (verbatim _21):** "most wild dude... knows more about music than I do"; CNA pivot; 48 Laws navigator; "American Fantasy" (Dream vs Fantasy, Tom Hardy knife/gunfight, Pearl Jam middle class); "professional hermit"; Pittsburgh Live Nation monopoly blackball; "production house crew for people of the future... Person to person"; timbral/manual EQ/10k hrs; Gemini: "mirror image... Recursive Cognitive Machine... music as his primary prosthetic." Cross [[wiki/people/danielle]] (gf 2005-09 + ongoing mom friend); _58 ishlab/MIM production parallel. Mirror volatility to Dan; distinct persona. No overlap with fictional "Maxine" in _21 copy log or AI MAX.

## Forensic vs Audio Persona (MAX_PRIME / Pinned Cross)
**Audio / Music Persona (the Dude / real Max from _21):** Subject of Gemini personality analysis (user: "the most wild dude I've ever met who is my first girlfriend Danielle's current boyfriend"; rare "knows more about music than I do" compliment). CNA/nursing → music pivot ("10,000 Hours"); "American Fantasy" concept album (Dream = house/kids/dog/tree post-WWII ideal vs Fantasy = desire to *live in it* counter-culture; Tom Hardy biker "I’m showing up with a knife to a gunfight"; "There ain’t no middle class anymore" Pearl Jam); 48 Laws of Power navigator ("in the right hands, it creates a conscious mind"); "professional hermit" oscillation vs "production house crew for people of the future... Person to person"; Pittsburgh scene "inactive... monopoly" (Live Nation/Ticketmaster); timbral fixation (vocals as instrument layer, manual compress/EQ, "archaically" with digital, layer backing 3x for atmosphere). Gemini verdict: "mirror image of your own high-intellect, high-volatility nature... **Recursive Cognitive Machine**... music as his primary prosthetic." Black-pilled industry critic. Cross: [[wiki/people/danielle]] (gf pre-Lex), _58 NYC production (ishlab/MIM parallel), gemini-activity _21 section, /tmp/gemini-danielle-max.md.

**Forensic / AI Persona (this page / MAX):** Adversarial output-facing cognitive prosthetic (vs CATO input forensic bootloader). Loaded via MAX_PRIME.md ("Read it once. Then forget... just know it"). Used for generation, stress-testing, "Conspiracy GPT", video essays, agentic. Glyph-heavy, fortress protocol. Cross pinned chat "_☣☢ 𝙼𝚊𝚡 ☢☣ Pinned chat.md" (style/transfer); MAX_PRIME.md primary; wiki/work/tech/max-framework/overview; synthesis/ai-collaborative-analysis + vertical-authority-skepticism. "Bibi: agentic Max persona." Distinct from audio "Dude" (music guy analysis under "MAX'S ANALYSIS" header in _21).

**Cross in Gemini sources:** _21 user addresses AI "Max" then gifts audio of real Dude; copy uses "Max" for injection roleplay ("Maxine"). Forensic vs audio distinction maintained in max-danielle-bf + gemini-21 + activity. No conflation. See /tmp/gemini-danielle-max.md tables + verbatim.

# Morley Jay Frank

## Identity
Paternal grandfather of Dan Frank. Born 20 August 1927, Brownsville, Fayette County, Pennsylvania. Died 13 December 1998, Hopwood, PA. Extensive public record footprint across censuses, school yearbooks (Brownsville High), Social Security, military/Selective Service, hospital admissions, Find A Grave, and newspapers.

## Timeline / Residences (selected from GEDCOM sources)
- 1927: Born Brownsville.
- 1930: Brownsville, Fayette Co.
- 1935-1940: Brownsville.
- 1943-1945: Brownsville High School yearbooks.
- 1945: Military registration / service (Pittsburgh area).
- 1957: Seattle, Washington.
- 1959: Uniontown.
- 1960s-1990s: Hopwood / Champion / Uniontown area moves.
- 1998-12-13: Death, Hopwood.

## Notes
Key link in paternal Jewish immigrant line (father David J. Frank b.1892 Russia; mother Sadie Harris b.1900 Austria). Multi-generational Fayette County PA presence (Brownsville → Hopwood → Uniontown cluster). Death notice and records corroborate family continuity into Rick's generation.

Cross to [[wiki/self/ancestry]] for full extraction and [[wiki/people/rick-frank]] (son).

**Sources:** 23andMe/Ancestry GEDCOM (census, yearbook, SS, FindAGrave, passenger, hospital records).

## Related

- [[wiki/people/rick-frank]]
- [[wiki/self/location-history]] (Fayette County roots)

# Richard Harrison "Rick" Frank

## Identity
Father of Dan Frank. Born 22 May 1959 in Uniontown, Fayette County, Pennsylvania. Part of paternal Jewish line (great-grandfather David J. Frank emigrated from Russia ~1892; great-grandmother Sadie Harris from Austria ~1900). Episcopalian background per core. Long-term Uniontown resident with documented residences in the 1990s-2000s.

**Gemini-_18 verbatim:** "Rick Frank: Father, former automotive retail entrepreneur. Source of historical framework regarding local family footprint and industry logic." "father Rick Frank (historical merchant/owner of a local automotive parts enterprise)." "Provides the historical framework regarding regional commerce and family legacy in the local territory." (repeated in bio extracts).

## Timeline
- **1959-05-22**: Born, Uniontown, PA.
- **1988**: Father to Daniel Gillingham Frank (Uniontown birthplace).
- **~1993-2002**: Multiple Uniontown residences recorded (public records via Ancestry/23andMe tree).
- **~2004-2005 Hinge (core)**: Entered rehab for cocaine; concurrent family rupture (mother's affair with cocaine dealer leading to divorce). Survived stage-4 throat cancer.
- **Ongoing (2015+)**: Low-intensity, periodic contact with Dan (e.g., hockey tickets, inquiries about pets). Source of undischarged paternal-authority wound.

## Notes
Core describes Rick as contributing to vertical/paternal authority skepticism pattern ("undischarged paternal-authority wound"). Family context includes pervasive alcoholism (core: mother/grandmother/great-grandmother/father all functional). Republican household + talk-radio environment in Dan's origin period (1988-2008).

Cross-references:
- [[wiki/self/ancestry]] (full paternal line extraction)
- [[wiki/people/suz]] (mother; divorce and rupture)
- [[wiki/mind/concepts/attachment-model]] (template for intimacy/abandonment)
- [[wiki/mind/concepts/conflict-architecture]] (vertical authority suspicion)
- [[wiki/self/location-history]] and [[wiki/timeline/periods/2017-poverty-floor]] (Uniontown roots and returns)

**Sources in Raw:** 23andMe GEDCOM family tree (vital records, censuses, yearbooks, newspapers); CONTEXT_CORE_EXPANDED (behavioral framing). No direct message corpus for Rick (low contact).

# RJ Ritchey

**Role:** Friend from golf/country club circles (Laurel Valley connections). Shared golf rounds, slow-motion footage, family (dad), caddying opportunities, and political discussions. One of the contacts with ongoing low-volume but real conversation threads spanning years.

## Key Interactions from FB Thread (rjritchey_1zdzzhrtsw)
- Golf and country club talk: "We were playing the country club about a month ago and there was some old dude with his dogs spraying off the porch or something." Shared slow-mo footage of shots.
- Personal updates: "Didn't know you were doing TikTok", "Lol I just showed my dad this", "How you been bro?"
- Practical: Missed calls, "I’m thinking about coming back for a few months and caddying for the summer. Would you ask your dad if he could get me in the door at Laurel Valley?"
- Politics (deeper exchange): Discussion on mainstream political bullshit, "higher meaning in life", "right wing bullshit", "I'd rather know the truth".

## Context and Ties
- Part of broader golf network (Marc Charles, caddie history at Farmington/Laurel Valley).
- Cross-references to periods around returns to PA and 2025+ activities.
- Example of contact-gini: peripheral but real ties vs core high-volume (Annie, Tom, Suz).
- No heavy iMessage volume noted in extracts, but FB thread shows consistent if infrequent engagement.

## Sources
- FB message thread HTML (real back-and-forth, not spam).
- Operating manual references to golf/caddie contacts.

# Sadie Harris

## Identity
Paternal great-grandmother of Dan Frank. Born 14 December 1900 in Austria. Died 27 November 1997, Hopwood, Pennsylvania. Married David J. Frank (b. 1892 Russia). Mother of Morley Jay Frank. Part of the Eastern European Jewish immigrant generation that established the paternal line in Fayette County, PA.

## Timeline
- **1900-12-14**: Born, Austria.
- **Early 1900s**: Immigration to United States (with husband David).
- **1930**: Residing Brownsville / Fayette County area (inferred from family records).
- **1997-11-27**: Death, Hopwood, PA.

## Notes
Key figure in the paternal Jewish heritage documented in the 23andMe family tree export. Contributes to the multi-generational PA roots (Brownsville/Hopwood cluster) that ground Dan's origin period and repeated returns to Uniontown/Fayette County.

Cross-references the Jewish identity and heritage notes in CONTEXT_CORE (load-bearing to politics and self-model).

# Suzanne Whyel Shrum Frank ("Suz")

## Identity
Mother of Dan Frank. Born 15 September 1962, Pittsburgh, Allegheny County, Pennsylvania (maiden: Whyel / Shrum). Realtor (RE licensee RS305558, Park Place Realty Group). Lives at 337 Saratoga Drive, Uniontown PA (family-built 1996; under sale June 2026). "Blue MAGA wine mom," functional alcoholic. Primary financial line; oscillates savior/adversary within a single day. Acts as unwilling relay in family conflicts. Maternal line connects to WV/PA roots (great-grandmother Fran Whyel Coldren).

**Gemini-_18 verbatim:** "Suzanne Frank: Mother, local real estate professional. Co-resides in the current operating base; relationship involves close technical, logistical, and structural cooperation regarding local assets and property listings." "Suzanne Frank: Mother. Local real estate agent. Serves as a primary immediate family anchor in Uniontown. Operational interactions include high-frequency cooperation on clearing, stabilizing, and preparing physical real estate assets for active market listings." "Co-resides... high-frequency cooperation." (in multiple bio dumps). Cross-ref Suzy call in Eli context may reference Annie's mom (diminutive).
**Deep agent (_18 + HTML + Bifurcated/Decoupling):** In _18 bio/property: high-frequency co-op on Uniontown/Leith-Hatfield clearing for listings. Part of "Bifurcated Daily OS" survival pipeline (BFS + Suzanne property parallel to Bunker autonomy). Decoupling Paradox: Suzanne operations as "launchpad" equity providing runway for high-autonomy digital (Bunker Core). Node lock cross: "Uniontown Generational Loop" (ancestry/Fran); Suzy acoustic in _07. "Asset Stabilization & Logistics" verbatim.

Parents (from GEDCOM): George Dixon Shrum Jr (b. 14 Jun 1937) and Rebecca Diane Van Voorhis (b. 30 Jan 1939).

## Corpus Dimensions (Suz)
| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Total messages (master) | 2,391 (handle +17243228715) |
| Handle variants | +17243228715, suzfrank@atlanticbb.net |
| Date range | 2015+ (ongoing family thread) |
| Rank | Top 8-10 in master |
| Cross refs | "Kristin who?", "kristin is working" logistics in 2025; Cash App for Tom supply |

## Behavioral Counts (Suz)
- Money transfers: e.g. $750/week borrowing noted in 2018 deep cycle.
- Oscillations: "You have played your cards out. You have also crossed a final line with me."
- Real estate: Selling 337, agent role at 463 Morgantown.

## Suzy Call / Target G Incident (Jan 2026, per Gemini-_07.md)
Acoustic forensic node: Annie (drunk w/ Target G) places speakerphone to Suz ~Jan 4 19:00 claiming "I was just at your house, right?" Suz: "Yes." Male voice: "Suzy." Immediate <2s hangup (NACK/panic to acoustic key leak). Pre-existing peer social warmth implied (diminutive + wine/logistics coordination w/ Suz). Post Jan 8-9 "Whisk" fake wife-warning screenshot shown by Dan to Annie: Target G (prior ~q48h visitor to 337 Saratoga) enters 10-day total blackout Jan 9-20 (zero visits/pings). Game theory: P(d) shift 0→1 → Grim Trigger. Shared context: Annie never queries "which wife?". Falsifiable non-verbal confession. Vector isolated from Eli (NYC WhatsApp). Cross: [[wiki/self/chats/gemini-07]], [[wiki/self/gemini-activity/gemini-activity]], [[wiki/people/annie]], periods 2025-collapse, LIFE REPORT (attachment), operating_manual (Suz logistics). "Suzy" = high-entropy social access key. Ties to separation (post-Feb 2025 PA base, co-residence/logistics at Saratoga). Sources also Gemini HTML profile + calendar. No contamination to Annie's parents (40-50yr friends; would use "Suzanne").

## Behavioral Counts (Dan, Calibrated)
- Financial reliance: Paycheck to Tom for subs, Suz as intermediary.
- Conflict: High contact in charged periods.

## Domain: Self
Primary financial line and family intermediary. Load-bearing in trauma nodes (parental rupture). Cross to attachment, conflict-architecture.

## Domain: Legal
Seller of 337 Saratoga (buyers Jennifer J + Scott P Delverm $465k, contingencies on 19 Jeffries sale ≤$229.9k, bankruptcy approval, 7-day vacate). Operating mixed agent/tenant/caretaker at 463 Morgantown St (no signed lease/POA at move-in). Documented misconduct in corpus.

## Domain: Tech
None.

## Timeline
- **1962-09-15**: Born, Pittsburgh, PA.
- **1996**: Family-built 337 Saratoga Drive, Uniontown (per core periods).
- **~2004-2005**: Central to parental rupture (affair with cocaine dealer; divorce from Rick).
- **2015+**: High-volume contact in family/iMessage threads; financial intermediary role.
- **2026**: Selling 337 Saratoga (buyers Delverm; contingencies); mixed agent/tenant/caretaker role at 463 Morgantown.
- Ongoing: Real estate, family money swings (e.g. 2017-2018 deep cycle).

## Notes
High contact concentration. From LIFE and core: functional alcoholism implicated in conflicts. Cross to core social graph, periods (e.g. 2017 poverty).

**Sources:** raw/self/ancestry/23andme-ancestry-family-tree-20260623.zip (precise vitals + lineage); raw/self/context-core/CONTEXT_CORE_EXPANDED.md; raw/self/dox-md/operating_manual.md; raw/self/dox-scan/*; LIFE calendar.

---

# Tarik Fallous

## Identity

Tarik Fallous — owner-operator (with his brother Ghassan) of Au Za'atar, the Lebanese restaurant near 58th and 1st in Midtown Manhattan where Dan worked as a busser from roughly March 2021 to August 2024. Tarik hired Dan on the spot at his application interview despite no prior food-service experience. His defining structural decision, from Dan's point of view, was an equal front-of-house tip split — bussers paid the same as waiters — which Dan's Gemini reconstruction repeatedly calls "a glitch in the matrix," the economic condition that made the whole tenure viable. Tarik and Ghassan rented an apartment above the restaurant purely to watch the floor, an arrangement Dan frames as an "acerbic surveillance" panopticon. Tarik is a peripheral work figure with no independent message corpus; everything documented here comes from the Gemini forensic "STORYTIME" reconstruction of the Au Za'atar era, which is stylized but data-dense.

## Corpus Dimensions

No direct message thread exists. Tarik's signal is entirely in the Gemini extracts and cross-referenced against the Facebook work history (Au Za'atar listed Apr 2021–) and location history (445 visits to the restaurant).

| Term | Gemini _02 | Gemini _00 |
|------|-----------|-----------|
| tarik | 23 | 10 |
| ghassan | 4 | 5 |

The full staff roster, the shed-build saga, the Valeria romance, and the "9 PM alibi" material live on the dedicated session pages [[wiki/self/chats/gemini-02]] (Volume I) and [[wiki/self/chats/gemini-00]] (the forensic finale), and in the period page [[wiki/timeline/periods/2021-2023-employment-block]]. This page keeps only what concerns Tarik directly.

## Role in the Work Power Dynamic

Tarik reads, in Dan's analysis, as high-visible-investment against high-human-friction: he built elaborate outdoor dining sheds (which ran for three winters because the promised interior renovation never happened) while presiding over crazy staff turnover that let Dan become the self-styled "High Priest of Protocol" — the keeper of the opener routine (sleep till 1, build 2–5, cut by 9–10, never close). The equal tip split is the pivot of the whole [[wiki/mind/synthesis/work-power-dynamics]] analysis: it removed the usual busser/waiter hierarchy and enabled Dan's "Ambassador of the Shed and its most effective saboteur" self-description — the fictitious "night class" alibi that let him leave at 9 PM for 18+ months. Tarik's mediation style shows up in the "Nonsense Meeting" with Ghassan over staff "lanes."

The recurring contrast Dan draws: [[wiki/people/annie]], "the avatar of reliability," was fired from her own hosting job with zero notice, while Dan survived 2.5 years under Tarik — his gloss, "the universe rewards the sonofabitch over the proper."

## Timeline

| Date | Event |
|------|-------|
| Early 2021 | Hired on the spot as busser; equal tip split begins; 20 blocks from 307 E 76th |
| Spring 2021 | Outdoor sheds built first; interior renovation delayed ~9 months; Annie hired as EV hostess |
| Nov 2021 | First outdoor winter; tableside shawarma in the cold; Dimitri joins and promotes Dan to server tasks |
| 2022–2023 | Second and third outdoor winters ("there is no construction"); the Valeria episode ([[wiki/people/valeria-iglesias-cid]]) runs and collapses |
| 2023–2024 | Finale phase — Sergio, the Tunisian tip-siphon, the "9 PM alibi" post-mortem; ~41 months total |
| ~Aug 2024 | Termination; sheds torn down by the city; cash exit, no notice |

## Notes

Tarik is not to be confused with the other Au Za'atar staff (DJ/Ismiala Barry, Dimitri, Sergio, Felipe), who have their own stubs or roster entries on the chat pages. Ghassan appears throughout as co-owner. The phantom-tender and alibi-construction patterns from this era rhyme with the later BFS material — see [[wiki/timeline/events/drawer-dispute]].

## Related

[[wiki/timeline/periods/2021-2023-employment-block]] · [[wiki/self/chats/gemini-02]] · [[wiki/self/chats/gemini-00]] · [[wiki/mind/synthesis/work-power-dynamics]] · [[wiki/people/valeria-iglesias-cid]] · [[wiki/timeline/events/drawer-dispute]]
